---
title: "Statistical analyzes : Simon Couillard <br><br>"
subtitle:
  "Project : ACQ5 multicohort <br>"
author: "Reference number : 1206 <br><br> By : Pascal Charland, Samuel Lemaire-Paquette, and Simon Couillard,"
date: " Last update : `r Sys.Date()`<br><br>"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme : united
    df_print: paged
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 1
    number_sections: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
# Define variable containing url
url <- "https://www.crchus.ca/clients/SanteEstrie/Sous-sites/Centres_de_recherche/CRCHUS/Medias-publications/signature_CR-CHUS_rvb-s2.jpg"
```

```{=html}
<script>
   $(document).ready(function() {
     $head = $('#header');
     $head.prepend('<img src="`r url`" style=\"float: right;width: 200px;\"/>')
   });
</script>
```

```{=html}
<style>
body {
text-align: justify}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<style type="text/css">
  body{
  font-size: 12pt;
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<style type="text/css">
.main-container {
  max-width: 1600px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
</style>
```

```{r Packages setup, include = FALSE}

options(scipen=999)

load_packages <- function(packages) {
  # Check which packages are not installed
  not_installed <- packages[!(packages %in% installed.packages()[,"Package"])]
  
  # Install missing packages if any
  if(length(not_installed) > 0) {
    install.packages(not_installed, dependencies = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Suppress package loading messages
  suppressPackageStartupMessages({
    invisible(lapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE))
  })
}

# List of packages
Packages <- c(
  "readxl","haven","ggplot2","dplyr","MASS","summarytools","car","lme4","lmerTest","nlme","multcomp","emmeans","ggeffects","ggiraphExtra","sjPlot","sjmisc","qwraps2","extrafont","openxlsx","igraph","gimme","purrr","ggthemes","plotly","knitr","gmodels","tidyverse","infer","skimr","pander", "RColorBrewer","expss","ggrepel","fmsb","lubridate","mgcv","nlme","glmmTMB","lmerTest","mice","table1","splines", "forplo", "cowplot","forestplot",'gridExtra','grid'
)

# Load packages
load_packages(Packages)

```

```{r p-value function, include = FALSE}

# P-value function for tables

pvalue <- function(x, ...) {
    y <- unlist(x)
    g <- factor(rep(1:length(x), times=sapply(x, length)))
    if (is.numeric(y)) {
        p <- wilcox.test(y ~ g)$p.value
    } else {
        p <- fisher.test(table(y, g))$p.value
    }
    c("", sub("<", "&lt;", format.pval(p, digits=3, eps=0.001)))
}

pvalue2 <- function(x, ...) {
  y <- unlist(x)
  g <- factor(rep(1:length(x), times=sapply(x, length)))
  
  if (is.numeric(y)) {
    p <- kruskal.test(y ~ g)$p.value
  } else {
    p <- fisher.test(table(y, g), simulate.p.value = TRUE, B = 20000)$p.value
  }
  
  c("", sub("<", "&lt;", format.pval(p, digits=3, eps=0.001)))
}


pvalue3 <- function(x, ...) {
    y <- unlist(x)
    g <- factor(rep(1:length(x), times=sapply(x, length)))
    if (is.numeric(y)) {
        p <- t.test(y ~ g)$p.value
    } else {
        p <- fisher.test(table(y, g))$p.value
    }
    c("", sub("<", "&lt;", format.pval(p, digits=3, eps=0.001)))
}

pvalue4 <- function(x, ...) {
  y <- unlist(x)
  g <- factor(rep(1:length(x), times = sapply(x, length)))
  
  if (is.numeric(y)) {
    # Use one-way ANOVA instead of Kruskal-Wallis
    p <- summary(aov(y ~ g))[[1]][["Pr(>F)"]][1]
  } else {
    p <- fisher.test(table(y, g), simulate.p.value = TRUE, B = 20000)$p.value
  }
  
  c("", sub("<", "&lt;", format.pval(p, digits = 3, eps = 0.001)))
}

```

```{r Data PRISMA, include = FALSE}

# PRISMA import

Data.Prisma <- read_excel("2025_03_24_Master.complete_WithSuppression.xlsx") %>% 
  filter(
    redcap_event_name == "visite_1_arm_1",
    HEALTHY_OR_ASTHMA == 1,
    EXCLUDE == 0
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    Age_at_study_enrollment_rescale10 = Age_at_study_enrollment*0.1,
    BMI_rescale5 = BMI/5,
    Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale = Pre_FEV1_PORC*-0.1,
    Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale = Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio*-0.1,
    Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat = ifelse(is.na(Total_exacerbations_12m),0,1),
    BloodEOS_Abso_log10 = log10(BloodEOS_Abso),
    FeNO_log10 = log10(FeNO),
    ACQ5_rescale = acq5_moy * 2,
    SpuEOS_PCT_log10 = log10(SpuEOS_PCT + 0.25),
    PBS_EOTAX_log10 = log10(PBS_EOTAX),
    PBS_IFNg_log10 = log10(PBS_IFNg),
    PBS_IL13_log10 = log10(PBS_IL13),
    PBS_IL4_log10 = log10(PBS_IL4),
    PBS_IL5_log10 = log10(PBS_IL5),
    PBS_IL33_log10 = log10(PBS_IL33),
    PBS_TARC_log10 = log10(PBS_TARC),
    PBS_TNFa_log10 = log10(PBS_TNFa),
    PBS_TSLP_log10 = log10(PBS_TSLP),
    PBS_PGD2_log10 = log10(PBS_PGD2),
    
    Rhinitis_cat = ifelse( Rhinitis == 0,"No","Yes"        ),
    Chronic_sinusitis_cat = ifelse( Chronic_sinusitis == 0,0,1        ),
    Nasal_Polyps_cat = ifelse( Nasal_Polyps == 0,0,1        ),
    
    CRSsNP = ifelse(Chronic_sinusitis_cat == 1 & Nasal_Polyps_cat == 0, "Yes", "No"),
    CRSwNP = ifelse(Chronic_sinusitis_cat == 1 & Nasal_Polyps_cat == 1, "Yes", "No")
  )

val_lab(Data.Prisma$Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat) <- make_labels("
                                                                       0 No
                                                                       1 Yes   
                                                                       ")

Data.Prisma$Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat <-  as.factor(Data.Prisma$Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat )

#Data.Prisma <- within(Data.Prisma, Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat <- relevel(Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat, ref = "No"))

val_lab(Data.Prisma$Sex) <- make_labels("
                                        1 Female
                                        2 Male
                                        ")
Data.Prisma$Sex <- as.factor(Data.Prisma$Sex)

Data.Prisma <- within(Data.Prisma, Sex <- relevel(Sex, ref = "Male"))


val_lab(Data.Prisma$Tobacco) <- make_labels("
                                        2 Never
                                        3 Ex
                                        ")
Data.Prisma$Tobacco <- as.factor(Data.Prisma$Tobacco)

Data.Prisma$T2_hothot_med_lowlow_ordinal <- Data.Prisma$T2_hothot_med_lowlow

val_lab(Data.Prisma$T2_hothot_med_lowlow) <- make_labels("
                                                                                 0 T2-Low/Low
                                                                                 1 T2-Mid
                                                                                 2 T2-High/High
                                                                                 ")
Data.Prisma$T2_hothot_med_lowlow <- as.factor(Data.Prisma$T2_hothot_med_lowlow)

Data.Prisma$GINA_Step <- as.factor(Data.Prisma$GINA_Step)

```

```{r Data Oracle, include = FALSE, warning = FALSE}

# ORACLE import

Data.oracle <- read_excel("ORACLE_DATA_not_fleur_V23_2024-07-11_captainadherence and stratos fev1rev multiplied by 100.xlsx") 

Data.oracle[Data.oracle == 9999] <- NA

Data.oracle <- Data.oracle %>% 
  mutate(
    Age_rescale10 = Age / 10,
    BMI_rescale5 = BMI / 5,
    .after = Treatment_arm
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    BEC_log10 = log10(Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L + 0.25),
    FeNO_log10 = log10(FeNO_baseline_ppb + 0.25),
    FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 = -FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline / 10,
    Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio = FEV1_preBD_L_Baseline / FVC_preBD_L_Baseline * 100,
    Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 = -Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio / 10,
    ACQ5_rescale = ACQ_baseline_score_mean * 2,
    CRSsNP = ifelse(Chronic_Rhinosinusitis_0no_1yes_9999notknown == 1 & Nasal_polyposis_0no_1yes_9999notknown == 0, "Yes", "No"),
    CRSwNP = ifelse(Chronic_Rhinosinusitis_0no_1yes_9999notknown == 1 & Nasal_polyposis_0no_1yes_9999notknown == 1, "Yes", "No"),
  )

Data.oracle$Treatment_step <- as.factor(Data.oracle$Treatment_step)
Data.oracle$CRSsNP <- as.factor(Data.oracle$CRSsNP)
Data.oracle$CRSwNP <- as.factor(Data.oracle$CRSwNP)

val_lab(Data.oracle$Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes) <- make_labels("
                                                                            0 No
                                                                            1 Yes
                                                                            ")
Data.oracle$Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes <- as.factor(Data.oracle$Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes)

val_lab(Data.oracle$Gender_0Female_1Male) <- make_labels("
                                                         0 Female
                                                         1 Male
                                                         ")
Data.oracle$Gender_0Female_1Male <- as.factor(Data.oracle$Gender_0Female_1Male)
Data.oracle$Gender_0Female_1Male <- relevel(Data.oracle$Gender_0Female_1Male, ref = "Male")

val_lab(Data.oracle$Smoking_0never_1ex_2current) <- make_labels("
                                                                0 Never
                                                                1 Ex
                                                                2 Current
                                                                ")
Data.oracle$Smoking_0never_1ex_2current <- as.factor(Data.oracle$Smoking_0never_1ex_2current)

val_lab(Data.oracle$AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown) <- make_labels("
                                                                            0 No
                                                                            1 Yes
                                                                            ")
Data.oracle$AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown <- as.factor(Data.oracle$AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown)

val_lab(Data.oracle$Chronic_Rhinosinusitis_0no_1yes_9999notknown) <- make_labels("
                                                                                 0 No
                                                                                 1 Yes
                                                                                 ")
Data.oracle$Chronic_Rhinosinusitis_0no_1yes_9999notknown <- as.factor(Data.oracle$Chronic_Rhinosinusitis_0no_1yes_9999notknown)

Data.oracle$T2_composite <- ifelse( Data.oracle$FeNO_baseline_ppb < 25 & Data.oracle$Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L < 0.15,0, 
                                            ifelse(Data.oracle$FeNO_baseline_ppb >= 35 & Data.oracle$Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L >= 0.3,2,1  ))


Data.oracle$T2_composite_ordinal <- Data.oracle$T2_composite


val_lab(Data.oracle$T2_composite) <- make_labels("
                                                                                 0 T2-Low/Low
                                                                                 1 T2-Mid
                                                                                 2 T2-High/High
                                                                                 ")
Data.oracle$T2_composite <- as.factor(Data.oracle$T2_composite)

# Data Dream
Data.oracle.dream <- Data.oracle %>% 
  filter(Enrolled_Trial_name == "DREAM") %>% 
  # Create a column for Placebo or Mepo
  mutate(
    Mepo_placebo = ifelse(Treatment_arm == "Placebo", "Placebo", "Mepo"),
    .after = Treatment_arm
  )

Data.oracle.dream$Mepo_placebo <- as.factor(Data.oracle.dream$Mepo_placebo)
Data.oracle.dream$Mepo_placebo <- relevel(Data.oracle.dream$Mepo_placebo, ref = "Placebo")

```

```{r Data Oracle imputed, include = FALSE, warning = FALSE}

# ORACLE imputed import

Data.oracle.imputed <- read_excel("data_ORACLE_imp_20250102_joined.xlsx")

Data.oracle.imputed[Data.oracle.imputed == "NA"] <- NA

Data.oracle.imputed <- Data.oracle.imputed %>% 
  mutate(
    Age_rescale10 = Age / 10,
    BMI_rescale5 = BMI / 5,
    .after = Treatment_arm
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 = -FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline / 10,
    FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 = -FEV1_FVC_ratio / 10,
    ACQ5_rescale = ACQ_baseline_score_mean * 2,
    Severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup_yesno = ifelse(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup == 0, "No", "Yes"),
    CRSsNP = ifelse(Chronic_Rhinosinusitis_0no_1yes_9999notknown == 1 & Nasal_polyposis_0no_1yes_9999notknown == 0, "Yes", "No"),
    CRSwNP = ifelse(Chronic_Rhinosinusitis_0no_1yes_9999notknown == 1 & Nasal_polyposis_0no_1yes_9999notknown == 1, "Yes", "No")
  )


Data.oracle.imputed$Treatment_step <- as.factor(Data.oracle.imputed$Treatment_step)
Data.oracle.imputed$CRSsNP <- as.factor(Data.oracle.imputed$CRSsNP)
Data.oracle.imputed$CRSwNP <- as.factor(Data.oracle.imputed$CRSwNP)

Data.oracle.imputed$Severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup_yesno <- as.factor(Data.oracle.imputed$Severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup_yesno)

val_lab(Data.oracle.imputed$Gender_0Female_1Male) <- make_labels("
                                                                 0 Female
                                                                 1 Male
                                                                 ")
Data.oracle.imputed$Gender_0Female_1Male <- as.factor(Data.oracle.imputed$Gender_0Female_1Male)
Data.oracle.imputed$Gender_0Female_1Male <- relevel(Data.oracle.imputed$Gender_0Female_1Male, ref = "Male")

Data.oracle.imputed$.imp <- Data.oracle.imputed$.imp -1

Data.imp <- as.mids(Data.oracle.imputed)

# Oracle2 (imputed version) Any ACQ dataset (n = 750)
exclude_trials <- c("AZISAST", "Novel_START", "PRACTICAL", "PACT", "DREAM")
Data.oracle.any.acq <- Data.oracle.imputed %>% filter(Enrolled_Trial_name %in% exclude_trials)

Data.oracle.any.acq$.imp <- Data.oracle.any.acq$.imp -1

Data.imp.anyacq <- as.mids(Data.oracle.any.acq)

```

```{r , include = FALSE}

#RASP-UK import

Data.raw.raspuk <- read_excel("RAW for SPSS v2 INCLUDES RASP-UK.xlsx") %>% 
  filter(Healthy0Asthma1 == 1)

Data.raw.raspuk[Data.raw.raspuk == 99999] <- NA

Data.raw.raspuk <- Data.raw.raspuk %>% 
  mutate(age_rescale10 = AgeD0 / 10,
    BMI_rescale5 = BMI / 5,
    BEC_log10 = log10(Blood_Eos_optimised + 0.25),
    FeNO_log10 = log10(FeNO_optimised + 0.25),
    FEV1_PCTpredicted_rescale10 = - FEV1_PCTpredicted_optimised / 10,
    FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 = - FEV1_FVC_ratio_optimised / 10,
    Previous_asthma_attack_yesno = ifelse(Number_of_Rescue_Steriod_Courses_In_12_Mths == 0, "No", "Yes"),
    Sp_Eos_optimised_log10 = log10(Sp_Eos_optimised + 0.25),
    Eotaxin_3_Optimised_sputm_log10 = log10(`Eotaxin-3_Optimised_sputm`),
    IFNgamma_Optimised_sputm_log10 = log10(IFNgamma_Optimised_sputm),
    IL13_Optimised_sputm_log10 = log10(IL13_Optimised_sputm),
    IL33_Optimised_sputm_log10 = log10(IL33_Optimised_sputm),
    IL4_Optimised_sputm_log10 = log10(IL4_Optimised_sputm),
    IL5_Optimised_sputm_log10 = log10(IL5_Optimised_sputm),
    TARC_Optimised_sputm_log10 = log10(TARC_Optimised_sputm),
    TNFalpha_Optimised_sputm_log10 = log10(TNFalpha_Optimised_sputm),
    TSLP_Optimised_sputm_log10 = log10(TSLP_Optimised_sputm),
    LTE4_Optimised_sputm_log10 = log10(LTE4_Optimised_sputm),
    PGD2_Optimised_sputm_log10 = log10(PGD2_Optimised_sputm))

Data.raw.raspuk$Previous_asthma_attack_yesno <- as.factor(Data.raw.raspuk$Previous_asthma_attack_yesno)

val_lab(Data.raw.raspuk$Sex0M1F) <- make_labels("
                                                0 Male
                                                1 Female
                                                ")
Data.raw.raspuk$Sex0M1F <- as.factor(Data.raw.raspuk$Sex0M1F)

Data.raw.raspuk$Gina_step <- NA

val_lab(Data.raw.raspuk$Smoking_status_0nil_1ex_2active) <- make_labels("
                                                  0 Never
                                                  1 Ex
                                                  2 Current
                                                  ")
Data.raw.raspuk$Smoking_status_0nil_1ex_2active <- as.factor(Data.raw.raspuk$Smoking_status_0nil_1ex_2active)


Data.raw.raspuk$AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown <- NA

Data.raw.raspuk$CRSsNP <- NA

Data.raw.raspuk$CRSwNP <- NA

```

```{r Data FeNO, echo = FALSE}

Data.feno <- Data.raw.raspuk %>% 
  filter(CohortOxf0Rasp1 == 0)

```

```{r Data RASP-UK, include = FALSE}

Data.raspuk <- Data.raw.raspuk %>% 
  filter(CohortOxf0Rasp1 == 1)

```

```{r Data Boost, include = FALSE}

# BOOST import

Data.boost <- read.csv("Data_Simon_final.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ",", dec = ".") %>% 
  mutate(
    delta = fev1_D7 - fev1_attack,
    Previous_asthma_attack_yesno = ifelse(exac_12m == 0, "No", "Yes"),
    BEC_log10 = log10(blood_eos_attack + 0.25),
    FeNO_log10 = log10(feno_attack),
    Age_rescale10 = Age / 10,
    BMI_rescale5 =  BMI/5,
    Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale = fev1_pct_attack*-0.1,
    Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale = fev1_fvc_attack*-0.1,
    ACQ5_rescale = acq_attack * 2,
    SpuEOS_PCT_log10 = log10(Sputum_eos_attack + 0.25)  )

Data.boost$Previous_asthma_attack_yesno <- as.factor(Data.boost$Previous_asthma_attack_yesno)

val_lab(Data.boost$Sex) <- make_labels("
                                       1 Male
                                       2 Female
                                       ")
Data.boost$Sex <- as.factor(Data.boost$Sex)

val_lab(Data.boost$Biologic) <- make_labels("
                                            1 mepo
                                            2 benra
                                            3 reslizumab
                                            ")
Data.boost$Biologic <- as.factor(Data.boost$Biologic)

val_lab(Data.boost$smoking_status) <- make_labels("
                                                  1 Never
                                                  2 Current
                                                  3 Ex smoker
                                                  ")
Data.boost$smoking_status <- as.factor(Data.boost$smoking_status)

Data.boost$Gina_step <- 5

Data.boost$Gina_step <- as.factor(Data.boost$Gina_step)

```

# Table 1 {.tabset .tabset-fade}

Frequencies and percentages will be presented for nominal variables. Means (standard deviation) and medians [interquartile range] will be presented for continuous variables. For comparisons between two groups, Mann-Whitney U tests will be used for continuous variables and Fisher's exact tests for categorical variables. For comparisons between three or more groups, Kruskal-Wallis tests will be used for continuous variables and Fisher's exact tests for categorical variables.

## Cytokine  {.tabset .tabset-fade}

### Non-paramétrique

```{r Data Cytokine,echo=FALSE}

Data.Prisma.cyto <- Data.Prisma %>% 
  dplyr::select(c("ID","SpuEOS_PCT","PBS_EOTAX","PBS_IFNg","PBS_IL13","PBS_IL4","PBS_IL5","PBS_IL33","PBS_TARC","PBS_TNFa","PBS_TSLP","PBS_PGD2")) %>% 
  mutate( Study = "Prisma")

Data.raw.raspuk.cyto <- Data.raw.raspuk %>% 
  dplyr::select(c("FENO_DiarySeqNumber","Sp_Eos_optimised","Eotaxin-3_Optimised_sputm","IFNgamma_Optimised_sputm","IL13_Optimised_sputm","IL4_Optimised_sputm","IL5_Optimised_sputm","IL33_Optimised_sputm","TARC_Optimised_sputm","TNFalpha_Optimised_sputm","TSLP_Optimised_sputm","PGD2_Optimised_sputm")) %>% 
  mutate( Study = "FeNO+RASP-UK") %>% 
  rename(   ID = FENO_DiarySeqNumber,
            SpuEOS_PCT = Sp_Eos_optimised,
            PBS_EOTAX = `Eotaxin-3_Optimised_sputm`,
            PBS_IFNg = IFNgamma_Optimised_sputm,
            PBS_IL13 = IL13_Optimised_sputm,
            PBS_IL4 = IL4_Optimised_sputm,
            PBS_IL5 = IL5_Optimised_sputm,
            PBS_IL33 = IL33_Optimised_sputm,
            PBS_TARC = TARC_Optimised_sputm,
            PBS_TNFa = TNFalpha_Optimised_sputm,
            PBS_TSLP = TSLP_Optimised_sputm,
            PBS_PGD2 = PGD2_Optimised_sputm)

Data.boost.cyto <- Data.boost %>% 
  dplyr::select( c("study_id","Sputum_eos_attack"))%>% 
  mutate( PBS_EOTAX = NA,
            PBS_IFNg = NA,
            PBS_IL13 = NA,
            PBS_IL4 = NA,
            PBS_IL5 = NA,
            PBS_IL33 = NA,
            PBS_TARC = NA,
            PBS_TNFa = NA,
            PBS_TSLP = NA,
            PBS_PGD2 = NA,
            Study = "BOOST") %>% 
  rename(   ID = study_id,
            SpuEOS_PCT = Sputum_eos_attack )

Data.cyto <- rbind( Data.Prisma.cyto,Data.raw.raspuk.cyto,Data.boost.cyto            )

table1( ~ SpuEOS_PCT + PBS_EOTAX + PBS_IFNg + PBS_IL13 + PBS_IL4 + PBS_IL5 + PBS_IL33 + PBS_TARC + PBS_TNFa + PBS_TSLP + PBS_PGD2   | Study, data = Data.cyto, overall = F, extra.col = list("P-value" = pvalue2), render.continuous=c(.="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), render.categorical="FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", topclass="Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")

```

### Paramétrique

```{r ,echo=FALSE}

table1( ~ SpuEOS_PCT + PBS_EOTAX + PBS_IFNg + PBS_IL13 + PBS_IL4 + PBS_IL5 + PBS_IL33 + PBS_TARC + PBS_TNFa + PBS_TSLP + PBS_PGD2   | Study, data = Data.cyto, overall = F, extra.col = list("P-value" = pvalue4), render.continuous=c(.="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), render.categorical="FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", topclass="Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")

```

## Master   {.tabset .tabset-fade}

### Non-paramétrique

```{r Data Master,echo=FALSE}

Data.oracle.dream.master <- Data.oracle.dream %>% 
  dplyr::select(c("Sequential_number","Gender_0Female_1Male","BMI","ACQ_baseline_score_mean","Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes","Treatment_step","FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline","Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio","Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L","FeNO_baseline_ppb","Smoking_0never_1ex_2current","AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown","CRSsNP","CRSwNP")) %>% 
  mutate( Study = "Dream")

Data.Prisma.master <- Data.Prisma %>% 
  dplyr::select(c("ID","Sex","BMI","acq5_moy","Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat","GINA_Step","Pre_FEV1_PORC","Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio","BloodEOS_Abso","FeNO","Tobacco","Rhinitis_cat","CRSsNP","CRSwNP")) %>% 
  mutate( Study = "Prisma") %>% 
  rename(   Sequential_number = ID,
            Gender_0Female_1Male = Sex,
            BMI = BMI,
            ACQ_baseline_score_mean = acq5_moy,
            Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes = Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat,
            Treatment_step = GINA_Step,
            FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline = Pre_FEV1_PORC,
            Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio = Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio,
            Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L = BloodEOS_Abso,
            FeNO_baseline_ppb = FeNO,
            Smoking_0never_1ex_2current = Tobacco,
            AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown = Rhinitis_cat,
            CRSsNP = CRSsNP ,
            CRSwNP =  CRSwNP)

Data.boost.master <- Data.boost %>% 
  dplyr::select(c("study_id","Sex","BMI","acq_attack","Previous_asthma_attack_yesno","Gina_step","fev1_pct_attack","fev1_fvc_attack","blood_eos_attack","feno_attack","smoking_status","Allergic_rhinitis","CRSsNP","CRSwNP")) %>% 
  mutate( Study = "BOOST")%>% 
  rename(   Sequential_number = study_id,
            Gender_0Female_1Male = Sex,
            BMI = BMI,
            ACQ_baseline_score_mean = acq_attack,
            Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes = Previous_asthma_attack_yesno,
            Treatment_step = Gina_step,
            FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline = fev1_pct_attack,
            Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio = fev1_fvc_attack,
            Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L = blood_eos_attack,
            FeNO_baseline_ppb = feno_attack,
            Smoking_0never_1ex_2current = smoking_status,
            AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown = Allergic_rhinitis,
            CRSsNP = CRSsNP ,
            CRSwNP =  CRSwNP)

Data.raw.raspuk.master <- Data.raw.raspuk %>% 
  dplyr::select(c("FENO_DiarySeqNumber","Sex0M1F","BMI","ACQ_optimised","Previous_asthma_attack_yesno","Gina_step","FEV1_PCTpredicted_optimised","FEV1_FVC_ratio_optimised","Blood_Eos_optimised","FeNO_optimised","Smoking_status_0nil_1ex_2active","AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown","CRSsNP","CRSwNP")) %>% 
  mutate( Study = "FeNO+RASP-UK")%>% 
  rename(   Sequential_number = FENO_DiarySeqNumber,
            Gender_0Female_1Male = Sex0M1F,
            BMI = BMI,
            ACQ_baseline_score_mean = ACQ_optimised,
            Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes = Previous_asthma_attack_yesno,
            Treatment_step = Gina_step,
            FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline = FEV1_PCTpredicted_optimised,
            Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio = FEV1_FVC_ratio_optimised,
            Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L = Blood_Eos_optimised,
            FeNO_baseline_ppb = FeNO_optimised,
            Smoking_0never_1ex_2current = Smoking_status_0nil_1ex_2active,
            AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown = AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown,
            CRSsNP = CRSsNP ,
            CRSwNP =  CRSwNP)

Data.master <- rbind( Data.oracle.dream.master ,Data.Prisma.master, Data.boost.master,Data.raw.raspuk.master   )

Data.master$Treatment_step <- as.factor(Data.master$Treatment_step)

table1( ~ Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI + ACQ_baseline_score_mean + Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes + Treatment_step + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio + Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L + FeNO_baseline_ppb + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown + CRSsNP + CRSwNP   | Study, data = Data.master, overall = F, extra.col = list("P-value" = pvalue2), render.continuous=c( .="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), render.categorical="FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", topclass="Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")

```

### Paramétrique

```{r ,echo=FALSE}

table1( ~ Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI + ACQ_baseline_score_mean + Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes + Treatment_step + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio + Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L + FeNO_baseline_ppb + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown + CRSsNP + CRSwNP   | Study, data = Data.master, overall = F, extra.col = list("P-value" = pvalue4), render.continuous=c( .="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), render.categorical="FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", topclass="Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")

```

## PRISMA  {.tabset .tabset-fade}

```{r ,echo=FALSE}

table1( ~ GINA_Step + Age_at_study_enrollment + Sex + BMI + BloodEOS_Abso + BloodEOS_Abso_log10 + FeNO + FeNO_log10 + Pre_FEV1_PORC + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio + Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat  + acq5_moy + V2_V1_Post_FEV1_L, data= Data.Prisma, render.continuous=c( .="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), render.categorical="FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", topclass="Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")

```

## Oracle DREAM {.tabset .tabset-fade}

### Complete

```{r, echo = FALSE}

table1( ~ Mepo_placebo + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI + ACQ_baseline_score_mean + Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes + Treatment_step + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio + Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L + FeNO_baseline_ppb + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown + CRSsNP + CRSwNP  + T2_composite, data = Data.oracle.dream, render.continuous=c( .="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), render.categorical="FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", topclass="Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")

```

### Mepo vs placebo  {.tabset .tabset-fade}

#### Non-paramétrique

```{r, echo = FALSE}

Data.dream.nona <- Data.oracle.dream %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Mepo_placebo))

table1( ~ Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI + ACQ_baseline_score_mean + Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes + Treatment_step + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio + Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L + FeNO_baseline_ppb + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown + CRSsNP + CRSwNP  + T2_composite | Mepo_placebo, data = Data.dream.nona, overall = F, extra.col = list("P-value" = pvalue), render.continuous=c( .="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), render.categorical="FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", topclass="Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")

```

#### Paramétrique

```{r, echo = FALSE}

Data.dream.nona <- Data.oracle.dream %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Mepo_placebo))

table1( ~ Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI + ACQ_baseline_score_mean + Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes + Treatment_step + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio + Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L + FeNO_baseline_ppb + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown + CRSsNP + CRSwNP  + T2_composite | Mepo_placebo, data = Data.dream.nona, overall = F, extra.col = list("P-value" = pvalue3), render.continuous=c( .="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), render.categorical="FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", topclass="Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")

```

## ORACLE2 {.tabset .tabset-fade}

### Full

```{r, echo = FALSE}

Data.oracle.imputed.imp1 <- Data.oracle.imputed %>% 
  filter(.imp == 1 )

table1( ~ Enrolled_Trial_name, data = Data.oracle.imputed.imp1, render.continuous=c( .="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), render.categorical="FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", topclass="Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")

```

### Any ACQ

```{r, echo = FALSE}

Data.oracle.any.acq.imp1 <- Data.oracle.any.acq %>% 
  filter(.imp == 1 )

table1( ~ Enrolled_Trial_name, data = Data.oracle.any.acq.imp1, render.continuous=c( .="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), render.categorical="FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", topclass="Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")

```

## FeNO

```{r, echo = FALSE}

table1( ~ AgeD0 + Sex0M1F + BMI + Blood_Eos_optimised + FeNO_optimised + FEV1_PCTpredicted_optimised + FEV1_FVC_ratio_optimised + ACQ_optimised + Previous_asthma_attack_yesno + Sp_Eos_optimised + `Eotaxin-3_Optimised_sputm` + IFNgamma_Optimised_sputm + IL13_Optimised_sputm + IL33_Optimised_sputm + IL4_Optimised_sputm + IL5_Optimised_sputm + TARC_Optimised_sputm + TNFalpha_Optimised_sputm + TSLP_Optimised_sputm + LTE4_Optimised_sputm + PGD2_Optimised_sputm, data = Data.feno, render.continuous=c( .="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), render.categorical="FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", topclass="Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")

```

## RASP-UK

```{r, echo = FALSE}

table1( ~ AgeD0 + Sex0M1F + BMI + Blood_Eos_optimised + FeNO_optimised + FEV1_PCTpredicted_optimised + FEV1_FVC_ratio_optimised + ACQ_optimised + Previous_asthma_attack_yesno + Sp_Eos_optimised + `Eotaxin-3_Optimised_sputm` + IFNgamma_Optimised_sputm + IL13_Optimised_sputm + IL33_Optimised_sputm + IL4_Optimised_sputm + IL5_Optimised_sputm + TARC_Optimised_sputm + TNFalpha_Optimised_sputm + TSLP_Optimised_sputm + LTE4_Optimised_sputm + PGD2_Optimised_sputm, data = Data.raspuk, render.continuous=c( .="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), render.categorical="FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", topclass="Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")

```

## FeNo + RASP-UK

```{r, echo = FALSE}

table1( ~ AgeD0 + Sex0M1F + BMI + Blood_Eos_optimised + FeNO_optimised + FEV1_PCTpredicted_optimised + FEV1_FVC_ratio_optimised + ACQ_optimised + Previous_asthma_attack_yesno + Sp_Eos_optimised + `Eotaxin-3_Optimised_sputm` + IFNgamma_Optimised_sputm + IL13_Optimised_sputm + IL33_Optimised_sputm + IL4_Optimised_sputm + IL5_Optimised_sputm + TARC_Optimised_sputm + TNFalpha_Optimised_sputm + TSLP_Optimised_sputm + LTE4_Optimised_sputm + PGD2_Optimised_sputm, data = Data.raw.raspuk, render.continuous=c( .="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), render.categorical="FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", topclass="Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")

```

## BOOST

```{r, echo = FALSE}

table1( ~ Age + Sex + BMI + Gina_step + acq_attack + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + Allergic_rhinitis + smoking_status + fev1_pct_attack + fev1_fvc_attack + blood_eos_attack + BEC_log10 + feno_attack + FeNO_log10 + delta, data = Data.boost, render.continuous=c( .="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), render.categorical="FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", topclass="Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")

```

## MasterV2 {.tabset .tabset-fade}

### Non-paramétrique

```{r, echo = FALSE}
# ORACLE2 - Full (n=6513)

Data.oracle.imputed_abs <- Data.oracle.imputed
Data.oracle.any.acq_abs <- Data.oracle.any.acq

Data.oracle.imputed_abs$Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L <-
  10 ^ Data.oracle.imputed$Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L_zeroreplaced

Data.oracle.imputed_abs$FeNO_baseline_ppb <-
  10 ^ Data.oracle.imputed$FeNO_baseline_ppb

Data.oracle.any.acq_abs$Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L <-
  10 ^ Data.oracle.any.acq$Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L_zeroreplaced

Data.oracle.any.acq_abs$FeNO_baseline_ppb <-
  10 ^ Data.oracle.any.acq$FeNO_baseline_ppb

Data.oracle2.full.master <- Data.oracle.imputed_abs %>% 
  filter(.imp == 1) %>%
  dplyr::select(c("Sequential_number","Gender_0Female_1Male","BMI","ACQ_baseline_score_mean","Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes","Treatment_step","FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline","FEV1_FVC_ratio","Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L","FeNO_baseline_ppb","Smoking_0never_1ex_2current","AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown","CRSsNP","CRSwNP")) %>% 
  mutate(Study = "ORACLE2 - Full",
         Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio = FEV1_FVC_ratio,
         ACQ_below_1.5 = ifelse(is.na(ACQ_baseline_score_mean), NA,
                                ifelse(ACQ_baseline_score_mean < 1.5, "Yes", "No"))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-FEV1_FVC_ratio)

# ORACLE2 - Any ACQ (n=750)
Data.oracle2.anyacq.master <- Data.oracle.any.acq_abs %>% 
  filter(.imp == 1) %>%
  dplyr::select(c("Sequential_number","Gender_0Female_1Male","BMI","ACQ_baseline_score_mean","Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes","Treatment_step","FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline","FEV1_FVC_ratio","Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L","FeNO_baseline_ppb","Smoking_0never_1ex_2current","AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown","CRSsNP","CRSwNP")) %>% 
  mutate(Study = "ORACLE2 - Any ACQ",
         Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio = FEV1_FVC_ratio,
         ACQ_below_1.5 = ifelse(is.na(ACQ_baseline_score_mean), NA,
                                ifelse(ACQ_baseline_score_mean < 1.5, "Yes", "No"))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-FEV1_FVC_ratio)

# DREAM - Placebo
Data.oracle.dream.placebo.master <- Data.oracle.dream %>% 
  filter(Mepo_placebo == "Placebo") %>%
  dplyr::select(c("Sequential_number","Gender_0Female_1Male","BMI","ACQ_baseline_score_mean","Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes","Treatment_step","FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline","Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio","Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L","FeNO_baseline_ppb","Smoking_0never_1ex_2current","AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown","CRSsNP","CRSwNP")) %>% 
  mutate(Study = "DREAM - Placebo",
         ACQ_below_1.5 = ifelse(is.na(ACQ_baseline_score_mean), NA,
                                ifelse(ACQ_baseline_score_mean < 1.5, "Yes", "No")))

# DREAM - Mepo
Data.oracle.dream.mepo.master <- Data.oracle.dream %>% 
  filter(Mepo_placebo == "Mepo") %>%
  dplyr::select(c("Sequential_number","Gender_0Female_1Male","BMI","ACQ_baseline_score_mean","Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes","Treatment_step","FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline","Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio","Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L","FeNO_baseline_ppb","Smoking_0never_1ex_2current","AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown","CRSsNP","CRSwNP")) %>% 
  mutate(Study = "DREAM - Mepo",
         ACQ_below_1.5 = ifelse(is.na(ACQ_baseline_score_mean), NA,
                                ifelse(ACQ_baseline_score_mean < 1.5, "Yes", "No")))

# SA-OIT (FeNO + RASP-UK)
Data.raw.raspuk.master <- Data.raw.raspuk %>% 
  dplyr::select(c("FENO_DiarySeqNumber","Sex0M1F","BMI","ACQ_optimised","Previous_asthma_attack_yesno","Gina_step","FEV1_PCTpredicted_optimised","FEV1_FVC_ratio_optimised","Blood_Eos_optimised","FeNO_optimised","Smoking_status_0nil_1ex_2active","AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown","CRSsNP","CRSwNP")) %>% 
  mutate(Study = "SA-OIT",
         ACQ_below_1.5 = ifelse(is.na(ACQ_optimised), NA,
                                ifelse(ACQ_optimised < 1.5, "Yes", "No"))) %>% 
  rename(Sequential_number = FENO_DiarySeqNumber,
         Gender_0Female_1Male = Sex0M1F,
         ACQ_baseline_score_mean = ACQ_optimised,
         Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes = Previous_asthma_attack_yesno,
         Treatment_step = Gina_step,
         FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline = FEV1_PCTpredicted_optimised,
         Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio = FEV1_FVC_ratio_optimised,
         Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L = Blood_Eos_optimised,
         FeNO_baseline_ppb = FeNO_optimised,
         Smoking_0never_1ex_2current = Smoking_status_0nil_1ex_2active)

# PRISMA
Data.Prisma.master <- Data.Prisma %>% 
  dplyr::select(c("ID","Sex","BMI","acq5_moy","Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat","GINA_Step","Pre_FEV1_PORC","Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio","BloodEOS_Abso","FeNO","Tobacco","Rhinitis_cat","CRSsNP","CRSwNP")) %>% 
  mutate(Study = "PRISMA",
         ACQ_below_1.5 = ifelse(is.na(acq5_moy), NA,
                                ifelse(acq5_moy < 1.5, "Yes", "No"))) %>% 
  rename(Sequential_number = ID,
         Gender_0Female_1Male = Sex,
         ACQ_baseline_score_mean = acq5_moy,
         Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes = Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat,
         Treatment_step = GINA_Step,
         FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline = Pre_FEV1_PORC,
         Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L = BloodEOS_Abso,
         FeNO_baseline_ppb = FeNO,
         Smoking_0never_1ex_2current = Tobacco,
         AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown = Rhinitis_cat)

# BOOST
Data.boost.master <- Data.boost %>% 
  dplyr::select(c("study_id","Sex","BMI","acq_attack","Previous_asthma_attack_yesno","Gina_step","fev1_pct_attack","fev1_fvc_attack","blood_eos_attack","feno_attack","smoking_status","Allergic_rhinitis","CRSsNP","CRSwNP")) %>% 
  mutate(Study = "BOOST",
         ACQ_below_1.5 = ifelse(is.na(acq_attack), NA,
                                ifelse(acq_attack < 1.5, "Yes", "No"))) %>% 
  rename(Sequential_number = study_id,
         Gender_0Female_1Male = Sex,
         ACQ_baseline_score_mean = acq_attack,
         Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes = Previous_asthma_attack_yesno,
         Treatment_step = Gina_step,
         FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline = fev1_pct_attack,
         Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio = fev1_fvc_attack,
         Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L = blood_eos_attack,
         FeNO_baseline_ppb = feno_attack,
         Smoking_0never_1ex_2current = smoking_status,
         AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown = Allergic_rhinitis)



val_lab(Data.oracle2.full.master$Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes) <- make_labels("
                                           0 No
                                           1 Yes
                                            ")
Data.oracle2.full.master$Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes <- as.factor(Data.oracle2.full.master$Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes)

val_lab(Data.oracle2.full.master$Smoking_0never_1ex_2current) <- make_labels("
                                           0 Never
                                           1 Ex
                                           2 Current
                                            ")
Data.oracle2.full.master$Smoking_0never_1ex_2current <- as.factor(Data.oracle2.full.master$Smoking_0never_1ex_2current)

val_lab(Data.oracle2.full.master$AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown) <- make_labels("
                                           0 No
                                           1 Yes
                                            ")
Data.oracle2.full.master$AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown <- as.factor(Data.oracle2.full.master$AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown)


val_lab(Data.oracle2.anyacq.master$Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes) <- make_labels("
                                           0 No
                                           1 Yes
                                            ")
Data.oracle2.anyacq.master$Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes <- as.factor(Data.oracle2.anyacq.master$Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes)

val_lab(Data.oracle2.anyacq.master$Smoking_0never_1ex_2current) <- make_labels("
                                           0 Never
                                           1 Ex
                                           2 Current
                                            ")
Data.oracle2.anyacq.master$Smoking_0never_1ex_2current <- as.factor(Data.oracle2.anyacq.master$Smoking_0never_1ex_2current)

val_lab(Data.oracle2.anyacq.master$AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown) <- make_labels("
                                           0 No
                                           1 Yes
                                            ")
Data.oracle2.anyacq.master$AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown <- as.factor(Data.oracle2.anyacq.master$AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown)

Data.boost.master$Smoking_0never_1ex_2current <- ifelse( Data.boost.master$Smoking_0never_1ex_2current == "Never","Never", "Ex"          )



# Combine all datasets
Data.master <- rbind(
  Data.oracle2.full.master,
  Data.oracle2.anyacq.master,
  Data.oracle.dream.placebo.master,
  Data.oracle.dream.mepo.master,
  Data.raw.raspuk.master,
  Data.Prisma.master,
  Data.boost.master
)

# Set factor levels to control column order
Data.master$Study <- factor(Data.master$Study, 
                             levels = c("ORACLE2 - Full", "ORACLE2 - Any ACQ",
                                        "DREAM - Placebo", "DREAM - Mepo",
                                        "SA-OIT", "PRISMA", "BOOST"))

Data.master$Treatment_step <- as.factor(Data.master$Treatment_step)

# Convert ACQ_below_1.5 to factor
Data.master$ACQ_below_1.5 <- as.factor(Data.master$ACQ_below_1.5)

table1(~ Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI + ACQ_baseline_score_mean + ACQ_below_1.5 + Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes + Treatment_step + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio + Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L + FeNO_baseline_ppb + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown + CRSsNP + CRSwNP | Study, 
       data = Data.master, overall = F, 
       extra.col = list("P-value" = pvalue2), 
       render.continuous = c( .="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), 
       render.categorical = "FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", 
       topclass = "Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")
```

### Paramétrique

```{r, echo = FALSE}

table1(~ Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI + ACQ_baseline_score_mean + Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes + Treatment_step + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio + Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L + FeNO_baseline_ppb + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown + CRSsNP + CRSwNP | Study, 
       data = Data.master, overall = F, 
       extra.col = list("P-value" = pvalue4), 
       render.continuous = c( .="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), 
       render.categorical = "FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", 
       topclass = "Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")
```

# Spline Curves Analysis: ACQ-5 Mean Score vs Treatment Response {.tabset .tabset-fade}

```{r Theme graphique, include = FALSE}

Data.oracle.dream$Treatment_step <- as.numeric(Data.oracle.dream$Treatment_step)
Data.oracle.imputed$Treatment_step <- as.numeric(Data.oracle.imputed$Treatment_step)
Data.oracle.any.acq$Treatment_step <- as.numeric(Data.oracle.any.acq$Treatment_step)

Data.imp <- as.mids(Data.oracle.imputed)
Data.imp.anyacq <- as.mids(Data.oracle.any.acq)

# Theme for the spline graphs
theme_graph <- theme(
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
  axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
  axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
  plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20),
  panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  panel.background = element_blank(),
  axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")
)

```

## PRISMA {.tabset}

### Unadjusted

```{r ,echo=FALSE, fig.width= 8 , fig.height= 5}

# Linear regression with spline 3 degree of freedom
model_spline <- lm(V2_V1_Post_FEV1_L ~  ns(acq5_moy, df = 3), data = Data.Prisma)

# Create data frame for the x axis
acq_seq <- data.frame(acq5_moy = seq(min(Data.Prisma$acq5_moy, na.rm = TRUE),
                                     max(Data.Prisma$acq5_moy, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 100))

# Prediction based on the linear regression
pred <- predict(model_spline, newdata = acq_seq, se.fit = TRUE)

# Add prediction and confidence interval in the data frame
acq_seq$fit <- pred$fit
acq_seq$se.fit <- pred$se.fit
acq_seq$lower <- acq_seq$fit - 1.96 * acq_seq$se.fit
acq_seq$upper <- acq_seq$fit + 1.96 * acq_seq$se.fit

# Graph of the spline with confidence interval
spline_prisma.uni <- ggplot(acq_seq, aes(x = acq5_moy, y = fit)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2)+
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.1, fill = "black") +
  xlab("\nMean ACQ-5") +
  ylab("Difference in FEV1 postBD (L)\n") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.7, 0.7), breaks = seq(-1, 1, by = 0.1)) +
  theme_sjplot2() +
  theme_graph

spline_prisma.uni

```

### Adjusted v1

Adjusted for BEC, FeNO and FEV1 V1 (Post_FEV1_L).

```{r ,echo=FALSE, fig.width= 8 , fig.height= 5}

# Linear regression adjusted with clinical parameters
mod_prisma <- lm(V2_V1_Post_FEV1_L ~  ns(acq5_moy, df = 3) + BloodEOS_Abso_log10 + FeNO_log10 + Post_FEV1_L, data = Data.Prisma)

# Create data frame for the x axis
acq_seq <- data.frame(acq5_moy = seq(min(Data.Prisma$acq5_moy, na.rm = TRUE),
                                     max(Data.Prisma$acq5_moy, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 100))

# Add median of all clinical parameters as a baseline
acq_seq$Age_at_study_enrollment <- median(Data.Prisma$Age_at_study_enrollment, na.rm = TRUE)
acq_seq$BMI <- median(Data.Prisma$BMI, na.rm = TRUE)
acq_seq$Sex <- "Female"
acq_seq$GINA_Step <- 3
acq_seq$BloodEOS_Abso_log10 <- median(Data.Prisma$BloodEOS_Abso_log10, na.rm = TRUE)
acq_seq$FeNO_log10 <- median(Data.Prisma$FeNO_log10, na.rm = TRUE)
acq_seq$Pre_FEV1_PORC <- median(Data.Prisma$Pre_FEV1_PORC, na.rm = TRUE)
acq_seq$Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio <- median(Data.Prisma$Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)
acq_seq$Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat <- "No"
acq_seq$Post_FEV1_L <- median(Data.Prisma$Post_FEV1_L, na.rm = TRUE)

# Prediction based on the linear regression adjusted
pred <- predict(mod_prisma, newdata = acq_seq, se.fit = TRUE)

# Add prediction and confidence interval in the data frame
acq_seq$fit <- pred$fit
acq_seq$se.fit <- pred$se.fit
acq_seq$lower <- acq_seq$fit - 1.96 * acq_seq$se.fit
acq_seq$upper <- acq_seq$fit + 1.96 * acq_seq$se.fit

# Graph of the spline with confidence interval
spline_prisma <- ggplot(acq_seq, aes(x = acq5_moy, y = fit)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2)+
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.1, fill = "black") +
  xlab("\nMean ACQ-5") +
  ylab("Adjusted Difference \nin FEV1 postBD (L)\n") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.4, 0.8), breaks = seq(-0.4, 0.8, by = 0.2)) +
  theme_sjplot2() +
  theme_graph

spline_prisma

```

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 5, fig.width = 10}

# Linear regression adjusted without the spline
mod <- lm(V2_V1_Post_FEV1_L ~  ACQ5_rescale + BloodEOS_Abso_log10 + FeNO_log10 + Post_FEV1_L, data = Data.Prisma)

# Data frame with rate ratio, confidence interval and p-value
Rate_ratio_prisma <- as.data.frame(cbind(round(Confint(mod), 2), "p_value" = round(summary(mod)$coefficients[,4], 3)))[-1,]

# Forest plot
forplo(
  Rate_ratio_prisma[,1:3],
  em = "RR",
  row.labels = c("ACQ5 (per 0.5)", "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)", "FeNO (per 10-fold)", 'Post FEV1 V1 (L)'),
  xlim = c(-1, 1),
  title = "",
  left.align = TRUE,
  margin.left = 16,
  add.columns = as.data.frame(cbind(rep(NA, 4), format(Rate_ratio_prisma$p_value, nsmall = 3))),
  add.colnames = c("", "P-Value"),
  margin.right = 11
)

```

### T2 composite

Adjusted only for FEV1 V1 (Post_FEV1_L) and T2 composite.

```{r ,echo=FALSE, fig.width= 8 , fig.height= 5}

# Linear regression adjusted with clinical parameters
mod_prisma <- lm(V2_V1_Post_FEV1_L ~  ns(acq5_moy, df = 3) + Post_FEV1_L + T2_hothot_med_lowlow_ordinal, data = Data.Prisma)

# Create data frame for the x axis
acq_seq <- data.frame(acq5_moy = seq(min(Data.Prisma$acq5_moy, na.rm = TRUE),
                                     max(Data.Prisma$acq5_moy, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 100))

# Add median of all clinical parameters as a baseline
acq_seq$Age_at_study_enrollment <- median(Data.Prisma$Age_at_study_enrollment, na.rm = TRUE)
acq_seq$BMI <- median(Data.Prisma$BMI, na.rm = TRUE)
acq_seq$Sex <- "Female"
acq_seq$GINA_Step <- 3
acq_seq$BloodEOS_Abso_log10 <- median(Data.Prisma$BloodEOS_Abso_log10, na.rm = TRUE)
acq_seq$FeNO_log10 <- median(Data.Prisma$FeNO_log10, na.rm = TRUE)
acq_seq$Pre_FEV1_PORC <- median(Data.Prisma$Pre_FEV1_PORC, na.rm = TRUE)
acq_seq$Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio <- median(Data.Prisma$Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)
acq_seq$Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat <- "No"
acq_seq$Post_FEV1_L <- median(Data.Prisma$Post_FEV1_L, na.rm = TRUE)
acq_seq$T2_hothot_med_lowlow_ordinal <- median(Data.Prisma$T2_hothot_med_lowlow_ordinal, na.rm = TRUE)

# Prediction based on the linear regression adjusted
pred <- predict(mod_prisma, newdata = acq_seq, se.fit = TRUE)

# Add prediction and confidence interval in the data frame
acq_seq$fit <- pred$fit
acq_seq$se.fit <- pred$se.fit
acq_seq$lower <- acq_seq$fit - 1.96 * acq_seq$se.fit
acq_seq$upper <- acq_seq$fit + 1.96 * acq_seq$se.fit

# Graph of the spline with confidence interval
spline_prismav2 <- ggplot(acq_seq, aes(x = acq5_moy, y = fit)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2)+
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.1, fill = "black") +
  xlab("\nMean ACQ-5") +
  ylab("Adjusted Difference \nin FEV1 postBD (L)\n") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.4, 0.8), breaks = seq(-0.4, 0.8, by = 0.2)) +
  theme_sjplot2() +
  theme_graph

spline_prismav2

```

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 5, fig.width = 10}

# Linear regression adjusted without the spline
mod <- lm(V2_V1_Post_FEV1_L ~  ACQ5_rescale + Post_FEV1_L + T2_hothot_med_lowlow_ordinal, data = Data.Prisma)

# Data frame with rate ratio, confidence interval and p-value
Rate_ratio_prisma <- as.data.frame(cbind(round(Confint(mod), 2), "p_value" = round(summary(mod)$coefficients[,4], 3)))[-1,]

# Forest plot
forplo(
  Rate_ratio_prisma[,1:3],
  em = "RR",
  row.labels = c("ACQ5 (per 0.5)", 'Post FEV1 V1 (L)','T2 ordinal'),
  xlim = c(-1, 1),
  title = "",
  left.align = TRUE,
  margin.left = 16,
  add.columns = as.data.frame(cbind(rep(NA, 3), format(Rate_ratio_prisma$p_value, nsmall = 3))),
  add.colnames = c("", "P-Value"),
  margin.right = 11
)

```

## BOOST {.tabset}

### Unadjusted

```{r ,echo=FALSE, fig.width= 8 , fig.height= 5}

# Linear regression with spline 3 degree of freedom
model_spline <- lm(delta ~ ns(acq_attack, df = 3), data = Data.boost)

# Create data frame for the x axis
acq_seq <- data.frame(acq_attack = seq(min(Data.boost$acq_attack, na.rm = TRUE),
                                     max(Data.boost$acq_attack, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 100))

# Prediction based on the linear regression
pred <- predict(model_spline, newdata = acq_seq, se.fit = TRUE)

# Add prediction and confidence interval in the data frame
acq_seq <- acq_seq %>% 
  mutate(
    fit = pred$fit,
    se.fit = pred$se.fit,
    lower = fit - 1.96 * se.fit,
    upper = fit + 1.96 * se.fit
  )

# Graph of the spline with confidence interval
spline_boost.uni <-  ggplot(acq_seq, aes(x = acq_attack, y = fit)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2)+
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.1, fill = "black") +
  xlab("\nMean ACQ-5") +
  ylab("Difference \nin FEV1 postBD (L)\n") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-10, 10), breaks = seq(-10, 10, by = 0.1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-10, 10), breaks = seq(-10, 10, by = 1)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(2, 6), ylim = c(-0.4, 1.2)) +
  theme_sjplot2() +
  theme_graph

spline_boost.uni

```

### Adjusted v1

Adjusted for BEC, FeNO and FEV1 V1 (fev1_attack).

```{r ,echo=FALSE, fig.width= 8 , fig.height= 5}

# Linear regression adjusted with clinical parameters
mod_boost <- lm(delta ~ ns(acq_attack, df = 3) + BEC_log10 + FeNO_log10 + fev1_attack, data = Data.boost)

# Create data frame for the x axis
acq_seq <- data.frame(acq_attack = seq(min(Data.boost$acq_attack, na.rm = TRUE),
                                     max(Data.boost$acq_attack, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 100))

# Add median of all clinical parameters as a baseline
acq_seq <- acq_seq %>% 
  mutate(
    Age_rescale10 = median(Data.boost$Age_rescale10, na.rm = TRUE),
    Sex = "Male",
    BMI_rescale5 = median(Data.boost$BMI_rescale5, na.rm = TRUE),
    BEC_log10 = median(Data.boost$BEC_log10, na.rm = TRUE),
    FeNO_log10 = median(Data.boost$FeNO_log10, na.rm = TRUE),
    Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale = median(Data.boost$Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale, na.rm = TRUE),
    Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale = median(Data.boost$Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale, na.rm = TRUE),
    Previous_asthma_attack_yesno = "No",
    fev1_attack = median(Data.boost$fev1_attack, na.rm = TRUE),
  )

# Prediction based on the linear regression adjusted
pred <- predict(mod_boost, newdata = acq_seq, se.fit = TRUE)

# Add prediction and confidence interval in the data frame
acq_seq <- acq_seq %>% 
  mutate(
    fit = pred$fit,
    se.fit = pred$se.fit,
    lower = fit - 1.96 * se.fit,
    upper = fit + 1.96 * se.fit
  )

# Graph of the spline with confidence interval
spline_boost <- ggplot(acq_seq, aes(x = acq_attack, y = fit)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2)+
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.1, fill = "black") +
  xlab("\nMean ACQ-5") +
  ylab(NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-10, 10), breaks = seq(-10, 10, by = 0.2)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-10, 10), breaks = seq(-10, 10, by = 1)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1, 5), ylim = c(-0.4, 0.8)) +
  theme_sjplot2() +
  theme_graph

spline_boost + ylab("Adjusted Difference \nin FEV1 postBD (L)\n")

```

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 5, fig.width = 10}

# Linear regression adjusted without the spline
mod <- lm(delta ~ ACQ5_rescale  + BEC_log10 + FeNO_log10 + fev1_attack, data = Data.boost)

# Data frame with rate ratio, confidence interval and p-value
Rate_ratio_boost <- as.data.frame(cbind(round(Confint(mod), 2), "p_value" = round(summary(mod)$coefficients[,4], 3)))[2:5,]

# Forest plot
forplo(
  Rate_ratio_boost[,1:3],
  em = "RR",
  row.labels = c("ACQ5 (per 0.5)", "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)", "FeNO (per 10-fold)", 'Post FEV1 V1 (L)'),
  xlim = c(-1, 1),
  title = "",
  left.align = TRUE,
  margin.left = 16,
  add.columns = as.data.frame(cbind(rep(NA, 4), format(Rate_ratio_boost$p_value, nsmall = 3))),
  add.colnames = c("", "P-Value"),
  margin.right = 11
)

```

## Oracle DREAM {.tabset}

### Unadjusted

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 8, warning=FALSE}

# Negative binomial regression with spline 
mod <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ ns(ACQ_baseline_score_mean, df = 3)*Mepo_placebo + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.oracle.dream)

# Create data frame for the x axis 
acq_seq <- data.frame(ACQ_baseline_score_mean = seq(min(Data.oracle.dream$ACQ_baseline_score_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
                                                    max(Data.oracle.dream$ACQ_baseline_score_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
                                                    length = 100))

# Baseline parameters for placebo
acq_seq_1 <- acq_seq %>% 
  mutate(
    Mepo_placebo = "Placebo",
    Follow_up_duration_days = median(Data.oracle.dream$Follow_up_duration_days, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# Baseline parameters for mepo
acq_seq_2 <- acq_seq %>% 
  mutate(
    Mepo_placebo = "Mepo",
    Follow_up_duration_days = median(Data.oracle.dream$Follow_up_duration_days, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# Prediction for placebo
pred1 <- predict(mod, newdata = acq_seq_1, se.fit = TRUE)
# Prediction for mepo
pred2 <- predict(mod, newdata = acq_seq_2, se.fit = TRUE)

# Add prediction and confidence interval in the data frame for placebo
acq_seq_1 <- acq_seq_1 %>% 
  mutate(
    fit_link = pred1$fit,
    se.fit_link = pred1$se.fit,
    CI_low_link = fit_link - 1.96 * se.fit_link,
    CI_up_link = fit_link + 1.96 * se.fit_link,
    fit = exp(fit_link),
    CI_low = exp(CI_low_link),
    CI_up = exp(CI_up_link)
  )

# Add prediction and confidence interval in the data frame for mepo
acq_seq_2 <- acq_seq_2 %>% 
  mutate(
    fit_link = pred2$fit,
    se.fit_link = pred2$se.fit,
    CI_low_link = fit_link - 1.96 * se.fit_link,
    CI_up_link = fit_link + 1.96 * se.fit_link,
    fit = exp(fit_link),
    CI_low = exp(CI_low_link),
    CI_up = exp(CI_up_link)
  )

# Bind data frame placebo and mepo
acq_seq <- rbind(acq_seq_1, acq_seq_2)

acq_seq$Mepo_placebo <- relevel(as.factor(acq_seq$Mepo_placebo), "Placebo")

# Graph of the splines with confidence intervals
acq_seq %>% ggplot(aes(x = ACQ_baseline_score_mean, y = fit, colour = Mepo_placebo)) + 
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = CI_low, ymax = CI_up, fill = Mepo_placebo), alpha = 0.1) +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "\nMean ACQ5",
    y = " Estimated annualised severe \nasthma attack rate \n"
  ) +
  theme_sjplot2() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Placebo" = "#00a1d5", "Mepo" = "#b24745")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Placebo" = "#00a1d5", "Mepo" = "#b24745")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), breaks = seq(0, 15, by = 1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 6), breaks = seq(0, 15, by = 1)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1, 5), ylim = c(0, 10)) +
  theme_graph +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )
  

```

### Adjusted - v1

GINA steps = 5 for all observations and no data for Allergic Rhinitis, variables weren't included in the final model.

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 8, warning = FALSE}

# Negative binomial regression with spline, adjusted with clinical parameter, interaction ACQ*Mepo_placebo, interaction Eos*Mepo_placebo, interaction FeNO*Mepo_placebo
mod_dream <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ ns(ACQ_baseline_score_mean, df = 3)*Mepo_placebo + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + BEC_log10*Mepo_placebo + FeNO_log10*Mepo_placebo + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.oracle.dream)

# Create data frame for the x axis 
acq_seq <- data.frame(ACQ_baseline_score_mean = seq(min(Data.oracle.dream$ACQ_baseline_score_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
                                                    max(Data.oracle.dream$ACQ_baseline_score_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
                                                    length = 100))

# Baseline parameters for placebo
acq_seq_1 <- acq_seq %>% 
  mutate(
    Mepo_placebo = "Placebo",
    Age_rescale10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$Age_rescale10, na.rm = TRUE),
    Gender_0Female_1Male = "Male",
    BMI_rescale5 = median(Data.oracle.dream$BMI_rescale5, na.rm = TRUE),
    BEC_log10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$BEC_log10, na.rm = TRUE),
    FeNO_log10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$FeNO_log10, na.rm = TRUE),
    FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10, na.rm = TRUE),
    Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10, na.rm = TRUE),
    #Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes = "No",
    Smoking_0never_1ex_2current = "Never",
    #AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown = "No",
    CRSsNP = "No",
    CRSwNP = "No",
    Follow_up_duration_days = median(Data.oracle.dream$Follow_up_duration_days, na.rm = TRUE),
  )

# Baseline parameters for mepo
acq_seq_2 <- acq_seq %>% 
  mutate(
    Mepo_placebo = "Mepo",
    Age_rescale10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$Age_rescale10, na.rm = TRUE),
    Gender_0Female_1Male = "Male",
    BMI_rescale5 = median(Data.oracle.dream$BMI_rescale5, na.rm = TRUE),
    BEC_log10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$BEC_log10, na.rm = TRUE),
    FeNO_log10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$FeNO_log10, na.rm = TRUE),
    FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10, na.rm = TRUE),
    Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10, na.rm = TRUE),
    #Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes = "No",
    Smoking_0never_1ex_2current = "Never",
    #AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown = "No",
    CRSsNP = "No",
    CRSwNP = "No",
    Follow_up_duration_days = median(Data.oracle.dream$Follow_up_duration_days, na.rm = TRUE),
  )

# Prediction for placebo
pred1 <- predict(mod_dream, newdata = acq_seq_1, se.fit = TRUE)
# Prediction for mepo
pred2 <- predict(mod_dream, newdata = acq_seq_2, se.fit = TRUE)

# Add prediction and confidence interval in the data frame for placebo
acq_seq_1 <- acq_seq_1 %>% 
  mutate(
    fit_link = pred1$fit,
    se.fit_link = pred1$se.fit,
    CI_low_link = fit_link - 1.96 * se.fit_link,
    CI_up_link = fit_link + 1.96 * se.fit_link,
    fit = exp(fit_link),
    CI_low = exp(CI_low_link),
    CI_up = exp(CI_up_link)
  )

# Add prediction and confidence interval in the data frame for mepo
acq_seq_2 <- acq_seq_2 %>% 
  mutate(
    fit_link = pred2$fit,
    se.fit_link = pred2$se.fit,
    CI_low_link = fit_link - 1.96 * se.fit_link,
    CI_up_link = fit_link + 1.96 * se.fit_link,
    fit = exp(fit_link),
    CI_low = exp(CI_low_link),
    CI_up = exp(CI_up_link)
  )

# Bind data frame placebo and mepo
acq_seq <- rbind(acq_seq_1, acq_seq_2)

acq_seq$Mepo_placebo <- relevel(as.factor(acq_seq$Mepo_placebo), "Placebo")

# Graph of the splines with confidence intervals
spline_dream <- acq_seq %>% ggplot(aes(x = ACQ_baseline_score_mean, y = fit, colour = Mepo_placebo)) + 
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = CI_low, ymax = CI_up, fill = Mepo_placebo), alpha = 0.1) +
  xlab("\nMean ACQ5") + 
  ylab(" Estimated annualised severe \nasthma attack rate \n") + 
  theme_sjplot2() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Placebo" = "#00a1d5", "Mepo" = "#b24745")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Placebo" = "#00a1d5", "Mepo" = "#b24745")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), breaks = seq(0, 15, by = 0.5)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 6), breaks = seq(0, 15, by = 1)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1, 5), ylim = c(0, 5)) +
  theme_graph  + 
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )

spline_dream + labs(y = " Estimated annualised severe \nasthma attack rate \n")

```

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 10, warning=FALSE}

# Negative binomial regression, adjusted with clinical parameter, interaction ACQ*Mepo, interaction Eos*Mepo, interaction FeNO*Mepo
mod <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ ACQ5_rescale*Mepo_placebo + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + BEC_log10*Mepo_placebo + FeNO_log10*Mepo_placebo + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.oracle.dream)

# Data frame with rate ratio, confidence interval and p-value
Rate_ratio_dream <- as.data.frame(cbind(round(exp(Confint(mod)), 2), "p_value" = round(summary(mod)$coefficients[,4], 3)))[-1,]

# Forest plot
forplo(
  Rate_ratio_dream[,1:3],
  em = "RR",
  row.labels = c("ACQ5 (per 0.5)", 
                 "Mepo", 
                 "Age (per 10 years)", 
                 "Sex - Female", 
                 "BMI (per 5)", 
                 "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)", 
                 "FeNO (per 10-fold)", 
                 "FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
                 "FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
                 "Smoking history",
                 "CRSsNP",
                 "CRSwNP",
                 "Mepo * ACQ5 (per 0.5)", 
                 "Mepo * Blood Eos (per 10-fold)",
                 'Mepo * FeNO (per 10-fold)'),
  xlim = c(0.2, 5),
  title = "",
  left.align = TRUE,
  margin.left = 16,
  add.columns = as.data.frame(cbind(rep(NA, 15), format(Rate_ratio_dream$p_value, nsmall = 3))),
  add.colnames = c("", "P-Value"),
  margin.right = 11
)

```

### Adjusted - T2 composite

GINA steps = 5 for all observations and no data for Allergic Rhinitis, variables weren't included in the final model.

Includes T2_composite (T2 Low/Low, T2-Mid, T2-High/High) treated as an ordinal variable where it replaces BEC × FeNO.

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 10, warning = FALSE}

# Negative binomial regression with spline, adjusted with clinical parameter, interaction ACQ*Mepo_placebo, interaction Eos*Mepo_placebo, interaction FeNO*Mepo_placebo
mod_dream <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ ns(ACQ_baseline_score_mean, df = 3)*Mepo_placebo + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + T2_composite_ordinal*Mepo_placebo + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.oracle.dream)

# Create data frame for the x axis 
acq_seq <- data.frame(ACQ_baseline_score_mean = seq(min(Data.oracle.dream$ACQ_baseline_score_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
                                                    max(Data.oracle.dream$ACQ_baseline_score_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
                                                    length = 100))

# Baseline parameters for placebo
acq_seq_1 <- acq_seq %>% 
  mutate(
    Mepo_placebo = "Placebo",
    Age_rescale10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$Age_rescale10, na.rm = TRUE),
    Gender_0Female_1Male = "Male",
    BMI_rescale5 = median(Data.oracle.dream$BMI_rescale5, na.rm = TRUE),
    BEC_log10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$BEC_log10, na.rm = TRUE),
    FeNO_log10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$FeNO_log10, na.rm = TRUE),
    FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10, na.rm = TRUE),
    Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10, na.rm = TRUE),
    #Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes = "No",
    Smoking_0never_1ex_2current = "Never",
    #AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown = "No",
    CRSsNP = "No",
    CRSwNP = "No",
    Follow_up_duration_days = median(Data.oracle.dream$Follow_up_duration_days, na.rm = TRUE),
    T2_composite_ordinal = median(Data.oracle.dream$T2_composite_ordinal, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# Baseline parameters for mepo
acq_seq_2 <- acq_seq %>% 
  mutate(
    Mepo_placebo = "Mepo",
    Age_rescale10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$Age_rescale10, na.rm = TRUE),
    Gender_0Female_1Male = "Male",
    BMI_rescale5 = median(Data.oracle.dream$BMI_rescale5, na.rm = TRUE),
    BEC_log10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$BEC_log10, na.rm = TRUE),
    FeNO_log10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$FeNO_log10, na.rm = TRUE),
    FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10, na.rm = TRUE),
    Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 = median(Data.oracle.dream$Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10, na.rm = TRUE),
    #Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes = "No",
    Smoking_0never_1ex_2current = "Never",
    #AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown = "No",
    CRSsNP = "No",
    CRSwNP = "No",
    Follow_up_duration_days = median(Data.oracle.dream$Follow_up_duration_days, na.rm = TRUE),
    T2_composite_ordinal = median(Data.oracle.dream$T2_composite_ordinal, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# Prediction for placebo
pred1 <- predict(mod_dream, newdata = acq_seq_1, se.fit = TRUE)
# Prediction for mepo
pred2 <- predict(mod_dream, newdata = acq_seq_2, se.fit = TRUE)

# Add prediction and confidence interval in the data frame for placebo
acq_seq_1 <- acq_seq_1 %>% 
  mutate(
    fit_link = pred1$fit,
    se.fit_link = pred1$se.fit,
    CI_low_link = fit_link - 1.96 * se.fit_link,
    CI_up_link = fit_link + 1.96 * se.fit_link,
    fit = exp(fit_link),
    CI_low = exp(CI_low_link),
    CI_up = exp(CI_up_link)
  )

# Add prediction and confidence interval in the data frame for mepo
acq_seq_2 <- acq_seq_2 %>% 
  mutate(
    fit_link = pred2$fit,
    se.fit_link = pred2$se.fit,
    CI_low_link = fit_link - 1.96 * se.fit_link,
    CI_up_link = fit_link + 1.96 * se.fit_link,
    fit = exp(fit_link),
    CI_low = exp(CI_low_link),
    CI_up = exp(CI_up_link)
  )

# Bind data frame placebo and mepo
acq_seq <- rbind(acq_seq_1, acq_seq_2)

acq_seq$Mepo_placebo <- relevel(as.factor(acq_seq$Mepo_placebo), "Placebo")

# Graph of the splines with confidence intervals
spline_dream <- acq_seq %>% ggplot(aes(x = ACQ_baseline_score_mean, y = fit, colour = Mepo_placebo)) + 
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = CI_low, ymax = CI_up, fill = Mepo_placebo), alpha = 0.1) +
  xlab("\nMean ACQ5") + 
  ylab("\nEstimated annualised severe \nasthma attack rate \n") + 
  theme_sjplot2() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Placebo" = "#00a1d5", "Mepo" = "#b24745")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Placebo" = "#00a1d5", "Mepo" = "#b24745")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), breaks = seq(0, 15, by = 0.5)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 6), breaks = seq(0, 15, by = 1)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1, 5), ylim = c(0, 5)) +
  theme_graph +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )

spline_dream + labs(y = " Estimated annualised severe \nasthma attack rate \n")

```

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 10, warning=FALSE}

# Negative binomial regression, adjusted with clinical parameter, interaction ACQ*Mepo, interaction Eos*Mepo, interaction FeNO*Mepo
mod <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ ACQ5_rescale*Mepo_placebo + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + T2_composite_ordinal*Mepo_placebo + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.oracle.dream)

# Data frame with rate ratio, confidence interval and p-value
Rate_ratio_dream <- as.data.frame(cbind(round(exp(Confint(mod)), 2), "p_value" = round(summary(mod)$coefficients[,4], 3)))[-1,]

# Forest plot
forplo(
  Rate_ratio_dream[,1:3],
  em = "RR",
  row.labels = c("ACQ5 (per 0.5)", 
                 "Mepo", 
                 "Age (per 10 years)", 
                 "Sex - Female", 
                 "BMI (per 5)", 
                 "T2 ordinal", 
                 "FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
                 "FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
                 "Smoking history",
                 "CRSsNP",
                 "CRSwNP",
                 "Mepo * ACQ5 (per 0.5)",
                 'Mepo * T2 ordinal'),
  xlim = c(0.2, 5),
  title = "",
  left.align = TRUE,
  margin.left = 16,
  add.columns = as.data.frame(cbind(rep(NA, 13), format(Rate_ratio_dream$p_value, nsmall = 3))),
  add.colnames = c("", "P-Value"),
  margin.right = 11
)

```

# Forest Plots: Baseline ACQ-5 Mean Score vs Clinical Parameters and Translational Parameters {.tabset .tabset-fade}

## Univariable {.tabset .tabset-fade}

```{r, echo = FALSE}

# Function to get the coefficient and confidence interval in univariable linear regression ACQ ~ parameter
# Enter : parameter, data
# Exit : Estimate, CI, p-value
lin_coef <- function(parameter, Data){
  
  ACQ5 <- ifelse(identical(Data, Data.Prisma), "acq5_moy", ifelse( identical(Data, Data.boost),'acq_attack',     "ACQ_optimised" )     )
  
  formule <- as.formula(paste0(ACQ5, "~", parameter))
  
  mod <- lm(formule, data = Data)
  
  valeur <- cbind(round(Confint(mod), 2), "p_value" = round(summary(mod)$coefficients[,4], 3))[-1,]
  
  return(valeur)
  
}

```

### PRISMA

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 9, fig.width = 13}

Data.Prisma$GINA_Step <- as.numeric(Data.Prisma$GINA_Step)

# Linear regression for all clinical parameters
GINA_Step_uni <- lin_coef("GINA_Step", Data.Prisma)
Age10_uni <- lin_coef("Age_at_study_enrollment_rescale10", Data.Prisma)
Sex_uni <- lin_coef("Sex", Data.Prisma)
BMI5_uni <- lin_coef("BMI_rescale5", Data.Prisma)
BEC_uni <- lin_coef("BloodEOS_Abso_log10", Data.Prisma)
FeNO_uni <- lin_coef("FeNO_log10", Data.Prisma)
FEV1_uni <- lin_coef("Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale", Data.Prisma)
FEV1_FVC_ratio_uni <- lin_coef("Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale", Data.Prisma)
Severe_asthma_attacks_uni <- lin_coef("Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat", Data.Prisma)

# Data frame with coefficients and confidence intervals for clinical parameters
param1 <- as.data.frame(rbind( Age10_uni, Sex_uni, BMI5_uni,GINA_Step_uni, BEC_uni, FeNO_uni, FEV1_uni, FEV1_FVC_ratio_uni, Severe_asthma_attacks_uni)) %>% mutate(group = 1)
# Add a p-value column with no data for clinical parameters
param1$p_adjust <- ""

# Linear regression for all translational parameters
SpuEOS_uni <- lin_coef("SpuEOS_PCT_log10", Data.Prisma)
PBS_EOTAX_uni <- lin_coef("PBS_EOTAX_log10", Data.Prisma)
PBS_IFNg_uni <- lin_coef("PBS_IFNg_log10", Data.Prisma)
PBS_IL13_uni <- lin_coef("PBS_IL13_log10", Data.Prisma)
PBS_IL4_uni <- lin_coef("PBS_IL4_log10", Data.Prisma)
PBS_IL5_uni <- lin_coef("PBS_IL5_log10", Data.Prisma)
PBS_IL33_uni <- lin_coef("PBS_IL33_log10", Data.Prisma)
PBS_TARC_uni <- lin_coef("PBS_TARC_log10", Data.Prisma)
PBS_TNFa_uni <- lin_coef("PBS_TNFa_log10", Data.Prisma)
PBS_TSLP_uni <- lin_coef("PBS_TSLP_log10", Data.Prisma)
PBS_PGD2_uni <- lin_coef("PBS_PGD2_log10", Data.Prisma)

# Data frame with coefficients and confidence intervals for translational parameters
param2 <- as.data.frame(rbind(SpuEOS_uni, PBS_EOTAX_uni, PBS_IFNg_uni, PBS_IL13_uni, PBS_IL4_uni, PBS_IL5_uni, PBS_IL33_uni, PBS_TARC_uni, PBS_TNFa_uni, PBS_TSLP_uni, PBS_PGD2_uni)) %>% mutate(group = 2)
# Adjusted p-value for translational parameters
param2$p_adjust <- round(p.adjust(param2$p_value, method =  "fdr"), 3)

# Data frame with estimate for clinical and translational parameters
param <- rbind(param1, param2)

# Forest plot
forplo(param[,1:3],
       em = "Coef",
       linreg = TRUE,
       row.labels = c("Age (per 10 years)", 
                      "Sex - Female", 
                      "BMI (per 5)", 
                      "GINA step", 
                      "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)", 
                      "FeNO (per 10-fold)", 
                      "FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
                      "FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
                      "Previous asthma attack", 
                      "Sputum eosinophils (%), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum eotaxin-3 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum IFN-gamma (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
                      "Sputum IL-13 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum IL-4 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum IL-5 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum IL-33 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum TARC (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum TNF-alpha (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum TSLP (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
                      "Sputum PGD2 (pg/mL), per 10-fold"),
       xlim = c(-2, 2),
       groups = param$group,
       grouplabs = c("Clinical Parameters", "Translational Parameters"),
       title = "",
       left.align = TRUE,
       margin.left = 20,
       # Add p-value and p-adjust columns
       add.columns = as.data.frame(cbind(rep(NA, 20), format(param$p_value, nsmall = 3), rep(NA, 20), format(param$p_adjust, nsmall = 3))),
       add.colnames = c("", "P-Value", "", "P-Adjust"),
       margin.right = 11
       )

```

### BOOST

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.height = 5, fig.width = 12}
# Linear regression for all clinical parameters
Age10_uni <- lin_coef("Age_rescale10", Data.boost)
Sex_uni <- lin_coef("Sex", Data.boost)
BMI5_uni <- lin_coef("BMI_rescale5", Data.boost)
BEC_uni <- lin_coef("BEC_log10", Data.boost)
FeNO_uni <- lin_coef("FeNO_log10", Data.boost)
FEV1_uni <- lin_coef("Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale", Data.boost)
FEV1_FVC_ratio_uni <- lin_coef("Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale", Data.boost)
Severe_asthma_attacks_uni <- lin_coef("Previous_asthma_attack_yesno", Data.boost)
SpuEOS_PCT_uni <- lin_coef("SpuEOS_PCT_log10", Data.boost)

param1 <- as.data.frame(rbind(
  Age10_uni, Sex_uni, BMI5_uni, BEC_uni, FeNO_uni,
  FEV1_uni, FEV1_FVC_ratio_uni, Severe_asthma_attacks_uni, SpuEOS_PCT_uni
)) %>% mutate(group = 1)

empty_row <- param1[1, ]
empty_row[,] <- NA
empty_row[,1:3] <- -999  # invisible value outside plotting range
param1 <- rbind(empty_row, param1)

param1 <- param1[c(2,3,4,1,5:10),]

p_values_text <- rep("", nrow(param1))
# Only fill the real rows, leave spacer row blank
real_rows <- setdiff(1:nrow(param1), 4)  # row 4 is spacer
p_values_text[real_rows] <- format(param1$p_value[real_rows], nsmall = 3)

add_text <- data.frame(
  V1 = rep("", nrow(param1)),
  V2 = p_values_text
)

forplo(
  param1[,1:3],
  em = "Coef",
  linreg = TRUE,
  row.labels = c(
    "Age (per 10 years)",
    "Sex - Female",
    "BMI (per 5)",
    "GINA step",
    "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)",
    "FeNO (per 10-fold)",
    "FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)",
    "FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)",
    "Previous asthma attack",
    "Sputum eosinophils (%), per 10-fold"
  ),
  xlim = c(-2, 2),
  left.align = TRUE,
  margin.left = 20,
  add.columns = add_text,
  add.colnames = c("", "P-Value"),
  margin.right = 11
)

rect(
  xleft = 1.1,
  xright = 5.5,
  ybottom = 5.5,
  ytop = 6.5,
  col = "white",
  border = NA
)
```

### FeNO

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.height = 9, fig.width = 13}

Age10_uni <- lin_coef("age_rescale10", Data.feno)
Sex_uni <- lin_coef("Sex0M1F", Data.feno)
BMI5_uni <- lin_coef("BMI_rescale5", Data.feno)
BEC_uni <- lin_coef("BEC_log10", Data.feno)
FeNO_uni <- lin_coef("FeNO_log10", Data.feno)
FEV1_uni <- lin_coef("FEV1_PCTpredicted_rescale10", Data.feno)
FEV1_FVC_ratio_uni <- lin_coef("FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10", Data.feno)
Previous_asthma_attack_uni <- lin_coef("Previous_asthma_attack_yesno", Data.feno)

param1 <- as.data.frame(rbind(
  Age10_uni, Sex_uni, BMI5_uni, BEC_uni, FeNO_uni,
  FEV1_uni, FEV1_FVC_ratio_uni, Previous_asthma_attack_uni
)) %>% mutate(group = 1)

param1$p_adjust <- ""  # blank column for clinical parameters

# -----------------------------
# Linear regression for translational parameters
# -----------------------------
Sp_Eos_uni <- lin_coef("Sp_Eos_optimised_log10", Data.feno)
Eotaxin_3_uni <- lin_coef("Eotaxin_3_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.feno)
IFNgamma_uni <- lin_coef("IFNgamma_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.feno)
IL13_uni <- lin_coef("IL13_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.feno)
IL33_uni <- lin_coef("IL33_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.feno)
IL4_uni <- lin_coef("IL4_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.feno)
IL5_uni <- lin_coef("IL5_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.feno)
TARC_uni <- lin_coef("TARC_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.feno)
TNFalpha_uni <- lin_coef("TNFalpha_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.feno)
```
