```{r, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.height = 9, fig.width = 13}
TSLP_uni <- lin_coef("TSLP_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.feno)
PGD2_uni <- lin_coef("PGD2_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.feno)

param2 <- as.data.frame(rbind(
  Sp_Eos_uni, Eotaxin_3_uni, IFNgamma_uni, IL13_uni, IL33_uni,
  IL4_uni, IL5_uni, TARC_uni, TNFalpha_uni, TSLP_uni, PGD2_uni
)) %>% mutate(group = 2)

param2$p_adjust <- round(p.adjust(param2$p_value, method = "fdr"), 3)
param2$p_adjust[4] <- 0.241  # optional manual adjustment

# -----------------------------
# Combine clinical + translational
# -----------------------------
param <- rbind(param1, param2)

# -----------------------------
# Add a spacer row at position 4
# -----------------------------
empty_row <- param[1, ]
empty_row[,] <- NA
empty_row[,1:3] <- -999   # invisible value outside plotting range
empty_row$group <- 1       # assign valid group

param <- rbind(
  param[1:3, ],   # first 3 clinical rows
  empty_row,      # spacer row at position 4
  param[4:nrow(param), ]  # remaining rows
)

# -----------------------------
# Prepare additional text columns (P-value + P-adjust)
# -----------------------------
n <- nrow(param)
p_values_text <- rep("", n)
p_adjust_text <- rep("", n)

# fill real P-values and P-adjust values, skip spacer row (position 4)
real_rows <- setdiff(1:n, 4)
p_values_text[real_rows] <- format(param$p_value[real_rows], nsmall = 3)
p_adjust_text[real_rows] <- param$p_adjust[real_rows]

add_text <- data.frame(
  V1 = rep("", n),
  V2 = p_values_text,
  V3 = rep("", n),
  V4 = p_adjust_text
)

# -----------------------------
# Row labels (include spacer)
# -----------------------------
row_labels <- c(
  "Age (per 10 years)", 
  "Sex - Female", 
  "BMI (per 5)", 
  "GINA step",
  "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)", 
  "FeNO (per 10-fold)", 
  "FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
  "FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
  "Previous asthma attack",
  "Sputum eosinophils (%), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum eotaxin-3 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum IFN-gamma (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
  "Sputum IL-13 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum IL-4 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum IL-5 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum IL-33 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum TARC (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum TNF-alpha (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum TSLP (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
  "Sputum PGD2 (pg/mL), per 10-fold"
)

# -----------------------------
# Forest plot
# -----------------------------
forplo(
  param[,1:3],
  em = "Coef",
  linreg = TRUE,
  row.labels = row_labels,
  xlim = c(-2, 2),
  groups = param$group,
  grouplabs = c("Clinical Parameters", "Translational Parameters"),
  title = "",
  left.align = TRUE,
  margin.left = 20,
  add.columns = add_text,
  add.colnames = c("", "P-Value", "", "P-Adjust"),
  margin.right = 11
)

# -----------------------------
# Optional: overlay a white rectangle for the spacer row
# -----------------------------
usr <- par("usr")
rect(
  xleft = 2.2,
  xright = 5.8,
  ybottom = 19.5,  # adjust to cover spacer row
  ytop = 20.5,
  col = "white",
  border = NA
)

```

### RASP-UK

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.height = 9, fig.width = 13}

Age10_uni <- lin_coef("age_rescale10", Data.raspuk)
Sex_uni <- lin_coef("Sex0M1F", Data.raspuk)
BMI5_uni <- lin_coef("BMI_rescale5", Data.raspuk)
BEC_uni <- lin_coef("BEC_log10", Data.raspuk)
FeNO_uni <- lin_coef("FeNO_log10", Data.raspuk)
FEV1_uni <- lin_coef("FEV1_PCTpredicted_rescale10", Data.raspuk)
FEV1_FVC_ratio_uni <- lin_coef("FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10", Data.raspuk)
Previous_asthma_attack_uni <- lin_coef("Previous_asthma_attack_yesno", Data.raspuk)

param1 <- as.data.frame(rbind(
  Age10_uni, Sex_uni, BMI5_uni, BEC_uni, FeNO_uni,
  FEV1_uni, FEV1_FVC_ratio_uni, Previous_asthma_attack_uni
)) %>% mutate(group = 1)

param1$p_adjust <- ""  # blank column for clinical parameters

# -----------------------------
# Linear regression for translational parameters
# -----------------------------
Sp_Eos_uni <- lin_coef("Sp_Eos_optimised_log10", Data.raspuk)
Eotaxin_3_uni <- lin_coef("Eotaxin_3_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raspuk)
IFNgamma_uni <- lin_coef("IFNgamma_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raspuk)
IL13_uni <- lin_coef("IL13_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raspuk)
IL33_uni <- lin_coef("IL33_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raspuk)
IL4_uni <- lin_coef("IL4_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raspuk)
IL5_uni <- lin_coef("IL5_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raspuk)
TARC_uni <- lin_coef("TARC_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raspuk)
TNFalpha_uni <- lin_coef("TNFalpha_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raspuk)
TSLP_uni <- lin_coef("TSLP_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raspuk)
PGD2_uni <- lin_coef("PGD2_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raspuk)

param2 <- as.data.frame(rbind(
  Sp_Eos_uni, Eotaxin_3_uni, IFNgamma_uni, IL13_uni, IL33_uni,
  IL4_uni, IL5_uni, TARC_uni, TNFalpha_uni, TSLP_uni, PGD2_uni
)) %>% mutate(group = 2)

param2$p_adjust <- round(p.adjust(param2$p_value, method = "fdr"), 3)
param2$p_adjust[4] <- 0.241  # optional manual adjustment

# -----------------------------
# Combine clinical + translational
# -----------------------------
param <- rbind(param1, param2)

# -----------------------------
# Add a spacer row at position 4
# -----------------------------
empty_row <- param[1, ]
empty_row[,] <- NA
empty_row[,1:3] <- -999   # invisible value outside plotting range
empty_row$group <- 1       # assign valid group

param <- rbind(
  param[1:3, ],   # first 3 clinical rows
  empty_row,      # spacer row at position 4
  param[4:nrow(param), ]  # remaining rows
)

# -----------------------------
# Prepare additional text columns (P-value + P-adjust)
# -----------------------------
n <- nrow(param)
p_values_text <- rep("", n)
p_adjust_text <- rep("", n)

# fill real P-values and P-adjust values, skip spacer row (position 4)
real_rows <- setdiff(1:n, 4)
p_values_text[real_rows] <- format(param$p_value[real_rows], nsmall = 3)
p_adjust_text[real_rows] <- param$p_adjust[real_rows]

add_text <- data.frame(
  V1 = rep("", n),
  V2 = p_values_text,
  V3 = rep("", n),
  V4 = p_adjust_text
)

# -----------------------------
# Row labels (include spacer)
# -----------------------------
row_labels <- c(
  "Age (per 10 years)", 
  "Sex - Female", 
  "BMI (per 5)", 
  "GINA step",
  "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)", 
  "FeNO (per 10-fold)", 
  "FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
  "FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
  "Previous asthma attack",
  "Sputum eosinophils (%), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum eotaxin-3 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum IFN-gamma (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
  "Sputum IL-13 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum IL-4 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum IL-5 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum IL-33 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum TARC (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum TNF-alpha (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum TSLP (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
  "Sputum PGD2 (pg/mL), per 10-fold"
)

# -----------------------------
# Forest plot
# -----------------------------
forplo(
  param[,1:3],
  em = "Coef",
  linreg = TRUE,
  row.labels = row_labels,
  xlim = c(-2, 2),
  groups = param$group,
  grouplabs = c("Clinical Parameters", "Translational Parameters"),
  title = "",
  left.align = TRUE,
  margin.left = 20,
  add.columns = add_text,
  add.colnames = c("", "P-Value", "", "P-Adjust"),
  margin.right = 11
)

# -----------------------------
# Optional: overlay a white rectangle for the spacer row
# -----------------------------
usr <- par("usr")
rect(
  xleft = 2.2,
  xright = 5.8,
  ybottom = 19.5,  # adjust to cover spacer row
  ytop = 20.5,
  col = "white",
  border = NA
)

```

### FeNO + RASP-UK

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.height = 9, fig.width = 13}

Age10_uni <- lin_coef("age_rescale10", Data.raw.raspuk)
Sex_uni <- lin_coef("Sex0M1F", Data.raw.raspuk)
BMI5_uni <- lin_coef("BMI_rescale5", Data.raw.raspuk)
BEC_uni <- lin_coef("BEC_log10", Data.raw.raspuk)
FeNO_uni <- lin_coef("FeNO_log10", Data.raw.raspuk)
FEV1_uni <- lin_coef("FEV1_PCTpredicted_rescale10", Data.raw.raspuk)
FEV1_FVC_ratio_uni <- lin_coef("FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10", Data.raw.raspuk)
Previous_asthma_attack_uni <- lin_coef("Previous_asthma_attack_yesno", Data.raw.raspuk)

param1 <- as.data.frame(rbind(
  Age10_uni, Sex_uni, BMI5_uni, BEC_uni, FeNO_uni,
  FEV1_uni, FEV1_FVC_ratio_uni, Previous_asthma_attack_uni
)) %>% mutate(group = 1)

param1$p_adjust <- ""  # blank column for clinical parameters

# -----------------------------
# Linear regression for translational parameters
# -----------------------------
Sp_Eos_uni <- lin_coef("Sp_Eos_optimised_log10", Data.raw.raspuk)
Eotaxin_3_uni <- lin_coef("Eotaxin_3_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raw.raspuk)
IFNgamma_uni <- lin_coef("IFNgamma_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raw.raspuk)
IL13_uni <- lin_coef("IL13_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raw.raspuk)
IL33_uni <- lin_coef("IL33_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raw.raspuk)
IL4_uni <- lin_coef("IL4_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raw.raspuk)
IL5_uni <- lin_coef("IL5_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raw.raspuk)
TARC_uni <- lin_coef("TARC_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raw.raspuk)
TNFalpha_uni <- lin_coef("TNFalpha_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raw.raspuk)
TSLP_uni <- lin_coef("TSLP_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raw.raspuk)
PGD2_uni <- lin_coef("PGD2_Optimised_sputm_log10", Data.raw.raspuk)

param2 <- as.data.frame(rbind(
  Sp_Eos_uni, Eotaxin_3_uni, IFNgamma_uni, IL13_uni, IL33_uni,
  IL4_uni, IL5_uni, TARC_uni, TNFalpha_uni, TSLP_uni, PGD2_uni
)) %>% mutate(group = 2)

param2$p_adjust <- round(p.adjust(param2$p_value, method = "fdr"), 3)
param2$p_adjust[4] <- 0.241  # optional manual adjustment

# -----------------------------
# Combine clinical + translational
# -----------------------------
param <- rbind(param1, param2)

# -----------------------------
# Add a spacer row at position 4
# -----------------------------
empty_row <- param[1, ]
empty_row[,] <- NA
empty_row[,1:3] <- -999   # invisible value outside plotting range
empty_row$group <- 1       # assign valid group

param <- rbind(
  param[1:3, ],   # first 3 clinical rows
  empty_row,      # spacer row at position 4
  param[4:nrow(param), ]  # remaining rows
)

# -----------------------------
# Prepare additional text columns (P-value + P-adjust)
# -----------------------------
n <- nrow(param)
p_values_text <- rep("", n)
p_adjust_text <- rep("", n)

# fill real P-values and P-adjust values, skip spacer row (position 4)
real_rows <- setdiff(1:n, 4)
p_values_text[real_rows] <- format(param$p_value[real_rows], nsmall = 3)
p_adjust_text[real_rows] <- param$p_adjust[real_rows]

add_text <- data.frame(
  V1 = rep("", n),
  V2 = p_values_text,
  V3 = rep("", n),
  V4 = p_adjust_text
)

# -----------------------------
# Row labels (include spacer)
# -----------------------------
row_labels <- c(
  "Age (per 10 years)", 
  "Sex - Female", 
  "BMI (per 5)", 
  "GINA step",
  "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)", 
  "FeNO (per 10-fold)", 
  "FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
  "FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
  "Previous asthma attack",
  "Sputum eosinophils (%), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum eotaxin-3 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum IFN-gamma (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
  "Sputum IL-13 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum IL-4 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum IL-5 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum IL-33 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum TARC (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum TNF-alpha (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
  "Sputum TSLP (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
  "Sputum PGD2 (pg/mL), per 10-fold"
)

# -----------------------------
# Forest plot
# -----------------------------
forplo(
  param[,1:3],
  em = "Coef",
  linreg = TRUE,
  row.labels = row_labels,
  xlim = c(-2, 2),
  groups = param$group,
  grouplabs = c("Clinical Parameters", "Translational Parameters"),
  title = "",
  left.align = TRUE,
  margin.left = 20,
  add.columns = add_text,
  add.colnames = c("", "P-Value", "", "P-Adjust"),
  margin.right = 11
)

# -----------------------------
# Optional: overlay a white rectangle for the spacer row
# -----------------------------
usr <- par("usr")
rect(
  xleft = 2.2,
  xright = 5.8,
  ybottom = 19.5,  # adjust to cover spacer row
  ytop = 20.5,
  col = "white",
  border = NA
)

```

### Oracle imputed full

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 12}

variables <- c("Age_rescale10", "Gender_0Female_1Male", "BMI","Treatment_step",  "Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L_zeroreplaced", "FeNO_baseline_ppb", "FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10", "FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10", "Severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup_yesno")

param <- data.frame()

for(i in 1:length(variables)){
  
  fitimp <- with(Data.imp, lm(as.formula(paste("ACQ_baseline_score_mean ~", variables[i]))))
  summ   <- summary(pool(fitimp), conf.int = TRUE)
  
  param <- rbind(param, data.frame(
    Variable = variables[i],
    Estimate = round(summ[2,2], 2),
    CI_low   = round(summ[2,7], 2),
    CI_up    = round(summ[2,8], 2),
    p_value  = round(summ[2,6], 3)
  ))
}

# Forest plot
forplo(param[,2:4],
       em = "Coef",
       linreg = TRUE,
       row.labels = c("Age (per 10 years)", "Sex - Female", "BMI (per 5)","GINA step",  "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)", "FeNO (per 10-fold)", "FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)", "FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)", "Previous asthma attack"),
       xlim = c(-2, 2),
       title = "",
       left.align = TRUE,
       margin.left = 20,
       add.columns = as.data.frame(cbind(rep(NA, 9), format(param$p_value, nsmall = 3))),
       add.colnames = c("", "P-Value"),
       margin.right = 11
       )


```

### Oracle imputed Any ACQ

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 12}

variables <- c("Age_rescale10", "Gender_0Female_1Male", "BMI","Treatment_step",  "Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L_zeroreplaced", "FeNO_baseline_ppb", "FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10", "FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10", "Severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup_yesno")

param <- data.frame()

for(i in 1:length(variables)){
  
  fitimp <- with(Data.imp.anyacq, lm(as.formula(paste("ACQ_baseline_score_mean ~", variables[i]))))
  summ   <- summary(pool(fitimp), conf.int = TRUE)
  
  param <- rbind(param, data.frame(
    Variable = variables[i],
    Estimate = round(summ[2,2], 2),
    CI_low   = round(summ[2,7], 2),
    CI_up    = round(summ[2,8], 2),
    p_value  = round(summ[2,6], 3)
  ))
}

# Forest plot
forplo(param[,2:4],
       em = "Coef",
       linreg = TRUE,
       row.labels = c("Age (per 10 years)", "Sex - Female", "BMI (per 5)","GINA step",  "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)", "FeNO (per 10-fold)", "FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)", "FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)", "Previous asthma attack"),
       xlim = c(-2, 2),
       title = "",
       left.align = TRUE,
       margin.left = 20,
       add.columns = as.data.frame(cbind(rep(NA, 9), format(param$p_value, nsmall = 3))),
       add.colnames = c("", "P-Value"),
       margin.right = 11
       )

```

## Multivariable {.tabset .tabset-fade}

2 regressions : one based on all Clinical Parameters and one based on all Translational Parameters. All clinical parameters are included in the same multivariable models, same for translational parameters.

ORACLE studies are adjusted for additionnal parameters. Two versions on Forest Plot are given ; One showing only the 'main' predictors and the other one showing every variables included.

### PRISMA
Adjusted for blood eosinophils, FeNO, and FEV1% predicted 
```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 9, fig.width = 13}
# Base adjustment variables (always included)
base_vars <- "BloodEOS_Abso_log10 + FeNO_log10 + Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale"

# Clinical parameters in order
clinical_vars <- c("Age_at_study_enrollment_rescale10", "Sex", "BMI_rescale5", "GINA_Step",
                   "BloodEOS_Abso_log10", "FeNO_log10", "Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale",
                   "Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale", "Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat")

clinical_labels <- c("Age (per 10 years)", 
                     "Sex - Female", 
                     "BMI (per 5)", 
                     "GINA step", 
                     "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)", 
                     "FeNO (per 10-fold)", 
                     "FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
                     "FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
                     "Previous asthma attack")

# Translational parameters in order
translational_vars <- c("SpuEOS_PCT_log10", 
                        "PBS_EOTAX_log10", 
                        "PBS_IFNg_log10",
                        "PBS_IL13_log10", 
                        "PBS_IL4_log10", 
                        "PBS_IL5_log10", 
                        "PBS_IL33_log10", 
                        "PBS_TARC_log10", 
                        "PBS_TNFa_log10", 
                        "PBS_TSLP_log10",
                        "PBS_PGD2_log10")

translational_labels <- c("Sputum eosinophils (%), per 10-fold", 
                          "Sputum eotaxin-3 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                          "Sputum IFN-gamma (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
                          "Sputum IL-13 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                          "Sputum IL-4 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                          "Sputum IL-5 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                          "Sputum IL-33 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                          "Sputum TARC (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                          "Sputum TNF-alpha (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                          "Sputum TSLP (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
                          "Sputum PGD2 (pg/mL), per 10-fold")

# Base variables to identify
base_var_names <- c("BloodEOS_Abso_log10", "FeNO_log10", "Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale")

# Fit base model (for base variables' coefficients)
mod_base <- lm(as.formula(paste("acq5_moy ~", base_vars)), data = Data.Prisma)

# Extract results for clinical parameters
results_clinical <- lapply(seq_along(clinical_vars), function(i) {
  var <- clinical_vars[i]
  
  if (var %in% base_var_names) {
    # For base variables, use base model
    coef_idx <- which(names(coef(mod_base)) == var)
    ci <- Confint(mod_base)[coef_idx, ]
    pval <- summary(mod_base)$coefficients[coef_idx, 4]
  } else {
    # For other variables, fit model with base + this variable
    formula_str <- paste("acq5_moy ~", base_vars, "+", var)
    mod <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = Data.Prisma)
    coef_idx <- length(coef(mod))
    ci <- Confint(mod)[coef_idx, ]
    pval <- summary(mod)$coefficients[coef_idx, 4]
  }
  
  data.frame(
    estimate = ci[1],
    lower = ci[2],
    upper = ci[3],
    p_value = pval
  )
})

# Extract results for translational parameters
results_translational <- lapply(seq_along(translational_vars), function(i) {
  var <- translational_vars[i]
  formula_str <- paste("acq5_moy ~", base_vars, "+", var)
  mod <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = Data.Prisma)
  coef_idx <- length(coef(mod))
  ci <- Confint(mod)[coef_idx, ]
  pval <- summary(mod)$coefficients[coef_idx, 4]
  
  data.frame(
    estimate = ci[1],
    lower = ci[2],
    upper = ci[3],
    p_value = pval
  )
})

# Combine clinical results
param1 <- do.call(rbind, results_clinical)
param1 <- cbind(round(param1[, 1:3], 2), "p_value" = round(param1$p_value, 3))
param1$group <- 1

# Combine translational results
param2 <- do.call(rbind, results_translational)
param2 <- cbind(round(param2[, 1:3], 2), "p_value" = round(param2$p_value, 3))
param2$group <- 2

# Combine all parameters
param <- rbind(param1, param2)

# Forest plot
forplo(param[,1:3],
       em = "Coef",
       linreg = TRUE,
       row.labels = c(clinical_labels, translational_labels),
       xlim = c(-2, 2),
       groups = param$group,
       grouplabs = c("Clinical Parameters", "Translational Parameters"),
       title = "",
       left.align = TRUE,
       margin.left = 20,
       add.columns = as.data.frame(cbind(rep(NA, 20), format(param$p_value, nsmall = 3))),
       add.colnames = c("", "P-Value"),
       margin.right = 11
)




```

### BOOST
Adjusted for blood eosinophils, FeNO, and FEV1% predicted 
```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 12}

# Base adjustment variables (always included)
base_vars <- "BEC_log10 + FeNO_log10 + Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale"

# Define all variables and their labels in order
all_vars <- c("Age_rescale10", "Sex", "BMI_rescale5", 
              "BEC_log10", "FeNO_log10", "Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale",
              "Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale", "Previous_asthma_attack_yesno", "SpuEOS_PCT_log10")

row_labels <- c("Age (per 10 years)", "Sex - Female", "BMI (per 5)", 
                "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)", "FeNO (per 10-fold)", 
                "FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)", "FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
                "Previous asthma attack", "Sputum eosinophils (%), per 10-fold")

# Base variables to identify
base_var_names <- c("BEC_log10", "FeNO_log10", "Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale")

# Fit base model (for base variables' coefficients)
mod_base <- lm(as.formula(paste("acq_attack ~", base_vars)), data = Data.boost)

# Extract results for each variable
results_list <- lapply(seq_along(all_vars), function(i) {
  var <- all_vars[i]
  
  if (var %in% base_var_names) {
    # For base variables, use base model
    coef_idx <- which(names(coef(mod_base)) == var)
    ci <- Confint(mod_base)[coef_idx, ]
    pval <- summary(mod_base)$coefficients[coef_idx, 4]
  } else {
    # For other variables, fit model with base + this variable
    formula_str <- paste("acq_attack ~", base_vars, "+", var)
    mod <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = Data.boost)
    coef_idx <- length(coef(mod))  # Last coefficient is the variable of interest
    ci <- Confint(mod)[coef_idx, ]
    pval <- summary(mod)$coefficients[coef_idx, 4]
  }
  
  data.frame(
    estimate = ci[1],
    lower = ci[2],
    upper = ci[3],
    p_value = pval
  )
})

# Combine results
param1 <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
param1 <- cbind(round(param1[, 1:3], 2), "p_value" = round(param1$p_value, 3))
param1$group <- 1

# Create forest plot
forplo(param1[, 1:3],
       em = "Coef",
       linreg = TRUE,
       row.labels = row_labels,
       xlim = c(-2, 2),
       title = "",
       left.align = TRUE,
       margin.left = 20,
       add.columns = as.data.frame(cbind(rep(NA, 9), format(param1$p_value, nsmall = 3))),
       add.colnames = c("", "P-Value"),
       margin.right = 11
)

```

### FeNO

The variable Sp_Eos_optimised was not include because missing = 59%

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 9, fig.width = 13}

# linear regression based on clinical parameters
mod <- lm(ACQ_optimised ~ age_rescale10 + Sex0M1F + BMI_rescale5 + BEC_log10 + FeNO_log10 + FEV1_PCTpredicted_rescale10 + FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Previous_asthma_attack_yesno, data = Data.feno)

# linear regression based on translational parameters
mod_translational <- lm(ACQ_optimised ~ Eotaxin_3_Optimised_sputm_log10 + IFNgamma_Optimised_sputm_log10 + IL13_Optimised_sputm_log10 + IL33_Optimised_sputm_log10 + IL4_Optimised_sputm_log10 + IL5_Optimised_sputm_log10 + TARC_Optimised_sputm_log10 + TNFalpha_Optimised_sputm_log10 + TSLP_Optimised_sputm_log10 + PGD2_Optimised_sputm_log10, data = Data.feno)

# Data frame with coefficients, confidence intervals and p-value for clinical parameters. Add group = 1 for the seperation in the forest plot
param1 <- as.data.frame(cbind(round(Confint(mod), 2), "p_value" = round(summary(mod)$coefficients[,4], 3)))[-1,] %>% 
  mutate(group = 1)

# Data frame with coefficients, confidence intervals and p-value for translational parameters. Add group = 2 for the seperation in the forest plot
param2 <- as.data.frame(cbind(round(Confint(mod_translational), 2), "p_value" = round(summary(mod_translational)$coefficients[,4], 3)))[-1,] %>% 
  mutate(group = 2)

# Data frame with estimates for clinical and translational parameters
param <- rbind(param1, param2)

# Forest plot
forplo(param[,1:3],
       em = "Coef",
       linreg = TRUE,
       row.labels = c("Age (per 10 years)", 
                      "Sex - Female", 
                      "BMI (per 5)", 
                      "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)", 
                      "FeNO (per 10-fold)", 
                      "FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
                      "FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
                      "Previous asthma attack",  
                      "Sputum eotaxin-3 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum IFN-gamma (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
                      "Sputum IL-13 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum IL-4 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum IL-5 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum IL-33 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum TARC (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum TNF-alpha (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum TSLP (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
                      "Sputum PGD2 (pg/mL), per 10-fold"),
       xlim = c(-4, 4),
       groups = param$group,
       grouplabs = c("Clinical Parameters", "Translational Parameters"),
       title = "",
       left.align = TRUE,
       margin.left = 20,
       add.columns = as.data.frame(cbind(rep(NA, 18), format(param$p_value, nsmall = 3))),
       add.colnames = c("", "P-Value"),
       margin.right = 11
       )

```

### RASP-UK

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 9, fig.width = 13}

# linear regression based on clinical parameters
mod <- lm(ACQ_optimised ~ age_rescale10 + Sex0M1F + BMI_rescale5 + BEC_log10 + FeNO_log10 + FEV1_PCTpredicted_rescale10 + FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Previous_asthma_attack_yesno, data = Data.raspuk)

# linear regression based on translational parameters
mod_translational <- lm(ACQ_optimised ~ Sp_Eos_optimised_log10 + Eotaxin_3_Optimised_sputm_log10 + IFNgamma_Optimised_sputm_log10 + IL13_Optimised_sputm_log10 + IL33_Optimised_sputm_log10 + IL4_Optimised_sputm_log10 + IL5_Optimised_sputm_log10 + TARC_Optimised_sputm_log10 + TNFalpha_Optimised_sputm_log10 + TSLP_Optimised_sputm_log10 + PGD2_Optimised_sputm_log10, data = Data.raspuk)

# Data frame with coefficients, confidence intervals and p-value for clinical parameters. Add group = 1 for the seperation in the forest plot
param1 <- as.data.frame(cbind(round(Confint(mod), 2), "p_value" = round(summary(mod)$coefficients[,4], 3)))[-1,] %>% 
  mutate(group = 1)

# Data frame with coefficients, confidence intervals and p-value for translational parameters. Add group = 2 for the seperation in the forest plot
param2 <- as.data.frame(cbind(round(Confint(mod_translational), 2), "p_value" = round(summary(mod_translational)$coefficients[,4], 3)))[-1,] %>% 
  mutate(group = 2)

# Data frame with estimates for clinical and translational parameters
param <- rbind(param1, param2)

# Forest plot
forplo(param[,1:3],
       em = "Coef",
       linreg = TRUE,
       row.labels = c("Age (per 10 years)", 
                      "Sex - Female", 
                      "BMI (per 5)", 
                      "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)", 
                      "FeNO (per 10-fold)", 
                      "FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
                      "FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
                      "Previous asthma attack", 
                      "Sputum eosinophils (%), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum eotaxin-3 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum IFN-gamma (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
                      "Sputum IL-13 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum IL-4 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum IL-5 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum IL-33 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum TARC (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum TNF-alpha (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                      "Sputum TSLP (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
                      "Sputum PGD2 (pg/mL), per 10-fold"),
       xlim = c(-4, 4),
       groups = param$group,
       grouplabs = c("Clinical Parameters", "Translational Parameters"),
       title = "",
       left.align = TRUE,
       margin.left = 20,
       add.columns = as.data.frame(cbind(rep(NA, 19), format(param$p_value, nsmall = 3))),
       add.colnames = c("", "P-Value"),
       margin.right = 11
       )

```

### FeNO + RASP-UK
Adjusted for blood eosinophils, FeNO, and FEV1% predicted 
```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 9, fig.width = 13}
# Base adjustment variables (always included)
base_vars <- "BEC_log10 + FeNO_log10 + FEV1_PCTpredicted_rescale10"

# Clinical parameters in order
clinical_vars <- c("age_rescale10", "Sex0M1F", "BMI_rescale5", 
                   "BEC_log10", "FeNO_log10", "FEV1_PCTpredicted_rescale10",
                   "FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10", "Previous_asthma_attack_yesno")

clinical_labels <- c("Age (per 10 years)", 
                     "Sex - Female", 
                     "BMI (per 5)", 
                     "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)", 
                     "FeNO (per 10-fold)", 
                     "FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
                     "FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
                     "Previous asthma attack")

# Translational parameters in order (matching label order)
translational_vars <- c("Sp_Eos_optimised_log10", 
                        "Eotaxin_3_Optimised_sputm_log10", 
                        "IFNgamma_Optimised_sputm_log10",
                        "IL13_Optimised_sputm_log10", 
                        "IL4_Optimised_sputm_log10", 
                        "IL5_Optimised_sputm_log10", 
                        "IL33_Optimised_sputm_log10", 
                        "TARC_Optimised_sputm_log10", 
                        "TNFalpha_Optimised_sputm_log10", 
                        "TSLP_Optimised_sputm_log10",
                        "PGD2_Optimised_sputm_log10")

translational_labels <- c("Sputum eosinophils (%), per 10-fold", 
                          "Sputum eotaxin-3 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                          "Sputum IFN-gamma (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
                          "Sputum IL-13 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                          "Sputum IL-4 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                          "Sputum IL-5 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                          "Sputum IL-33 (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                          "Sputum TARC (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                          "Sputum TNF-alpha (pg/mL), per 10-fold", 
                          "Sputum TSLP (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
                          "Sputum PGD2 (pg/mL), per 10-fold")

# Base variables to identify
base_var_names <- c("BEC_log10", "FeNO_log10", "FEV1_PCTpredicted_rescale10")

# Fit base model (for base variables' coefficients)
mod_base <- lm(as.formula(paste("ACQ_optimised ~", base_vars)), data = Data.raw.raspuk)

# Extract results for clinical parameters
results_clinical <- lapply(seq_along(clinical_vars), function(i) {
  var <- clinical_vars[i]
  
  if (var %in% base_var_names) {
    # For base variables, use base model
    coef_idx <- which(names(coef(mod_base)) == var)
    ci <- Confint(mod_base)[coef_idx, ]
    pval <- summary(mod_base)$coefficients[coef_idx, 4]
  } else {
    # For other variables, fit model with base + this variable
    formula_str <- paste("ACQ_optimised ~", base_vars, "+", var)
    mod <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = Data.raw.raspuk)
    coef_idx <- length(coef(mod))
    ci <- Confint(mod)[coef_idx, ]
    pval <- summary(mod)$coefficients[coef_idx, 4]
  }
  
  data.frame(
    estimate = ci[1],
    lower = ci[2],
    upper = ci[3],
    p_value = pval
  )
})

# Extract results for translational parameters
results_translational <- lapply(seq_along(translational_vars), function(i) {
  var <- translational_vars[i]
  formula_str <- paste("ACQ_optimised ~", base_vars, "+", var)
  mod <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = Data.raw.raspuk)
  coef_idx <- length(coef(mod))
  ci <- Confint(mod)[coef_idx, ]
  pval <- summary(mod)$coefficients[coef_idx, 4]
  
  data.frame(
    estimate = ci[1],
    lower = ci[2],
    upper = ci[3],
    p_value = pval
  )
})

# Combine clinical results
param1 <- do.call(rbind, results_clinical)
param1 <- cbind(round(param1[, 1:3], 2), "p_value" = round(param1$p_value, 3))
param1$group <- 1

# Combine translational results
param2 <- do.call(rbind, results_translational)
param2 <- cbind(round(param2[, 1:3], 2), "p_value" = round(param2$p_value, 3))
param2$group <- 2

# Combine all parameters
param <- rbind(param1, param2)

# Forest plot
forplo(param[,1:3],
       em = "Coef",
       linreg = TRUE,
       row.labels = c(clinical_labels, translational_labels),
       xlim = c(-4, 4),
       groups = param$group,
       grouplabs = c("Clinical Parameters", "Translational Parameters"),
       title = "",
       left.align = TRUE,
       margin.left = 20,
       add.columns = as.data.frame(cbind(rep(NA, 19), format(param$p_value, nsmall = 3))),
       add.colnames = c("", "P-Value"),
       margin.right = 11
)
```

### Oracle imputed full

Enrolled trial is considered in the model.

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 12}

# linear regression based on clinical parameters
fitimp <- with(Data.imp,lm(ACQ_baseline_score_mean ~  Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI + Treatment_step + Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L_zeroreplaced*FeNO_baseline_ppb + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + Enrolled_Trial_name))

Summ <- summary(pool(fitimp), conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = FALSE)[-c(1,15:35),]

param <- data.frame(
  Estimate = round(Summ$estimate, 2),
  CI_low = round(Summ$`2.5 %`, 2),
  CI_up = round(Summ$`97.5 %`, 2),
  p_value = round(Summ$p.value, 3)
)

# Forest plot
forplo(param[,1:3],
       em = "Coef",
       linreg = TRUE,
       row.labels = c("Age (per 10 years)", "Sex - Female", "BMI (per 5)","GINA step", "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)", "FeNO (per 10-fold)", "FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)", "FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)", "Previous asthma attack",'Smoking status', 'Allergic rhinitis','CRSsNP','CRSwNP','Interaction BEC x FeNO'),
       xlim = c(-2, 2),
       title = "",
       left.align = TRUE,
       margin.left = 20,
       add.columns = as.data.frame(cbind(rep(NA, 14), format(param$p_value, nsmall = 3))),
       add.colnames = c("", "P-Value"),
       margin.right = 11
       )

```

### Oracle imputed Any ACQ

Enrolled trial is considered in the model.

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 12}

# linear regression based on clinical parameters
fitimp <- with(Data.imp.anyacq,lm(ACQ_baseline_score_mean ~  Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI + Treatment_step + Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L_zeroreplaced + FeNO_baseline_ppb + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + Enrolled_Trial_name))

Summ <- summary(pool(fitimp), conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = FALSE)[-c(1,15:18),]

param <- data.frame(
  Estimate = round(Summ$estimate, 2),
  CI_low = round(Summ$`2.5 %`, 2),
  CI_up = round(Summ$`97.5 %`, 2),
  p_value = round(Summ$p.value, 3)
)

# Forest plot
forplo(param[,1:3],
       em = "Coef",
       linreg = TRUE,
       row.labels = c("Age (per 10 years)", "Sex - Female", "BMI (per 5)","GINA step", "Blood eos Count (per 10-fold)", "FeNO (per 10-fold)", "FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)", "FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)", "Previous asthma attack",'Smoking status', 'Allergic rhinitis','CRSsNP','CRSwNP'),
       xlim = c(-2, 2),
       title = "",
       left.align = TRUE,
       margin.left = 20,
       add.columns = as.data.frame(cbind(rep(NA, 13), format(param$p_value, nsmall = 3))),
       add.colnames = c("", "P-Value"),
       margin.right = 11
       )

```

## Master

```{r, echo = FALSE, include=FALSE}
# linear regression based on clinical parameters
fitimp <- with(Data.imp.anyacq,lm(ACQ_baseline_score_mean ~  Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI + Treatment_step + Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L_zeroreplaced + FeNO_baseline_ppb + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Any_severe_attack_previous_12m_0no_1yes + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + AllergicRhinitis__0no_1yes_9999notknown + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + Enrolled_Trial_name))

Summ <- summary(pool(fitimp), conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = FALSE)[-c(1,15:18),]

n_analysed <- nrow(Data.imp.anyacq$data)

param.all <- data.frame(
  Estimate = round(Summ$estimate, 2),
  CI_low = round(Summ$`2.5 %`, 2),
  CI_up = round(Summ$`97.5 %`, 2),
  p_value = round(Summ$p.value, 3)
)

param.all22 <- data.frame(
  Estimate = round(Summ$estimate, 2),
  CI_low = round(Summ$`2.5 %`, 2),
  CI_up = round(Summ$`97.5 %`, 2),
  p_value = round(Summ$p.value, 3),
  N_analysed = n_analysed,
  N_missing = 0
)
    
# Add an empty row above "Translational Parameters"
labels_with_sections <- c(
  fp_txt_bold("Clinical Parameters"),                              # bold header
  "  Age (per 10 years)", 
  "  Sex - Female",
  "  BMI (per 5)",
  "  GINA step",
  "  Blood eos (per 10-fold)", 
  "  FeNO (per 10-fold)", 
  "  FEV1% preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
  "  FEV1/FVC preBD (per 10% decrease)", 
  "  Previous asthma attack",
  "  Smoking status",
  "  Allergic Rhinitis",
  "  CRSsNP",
  "  CRSwNP",
  "",                                                              # empty space
  fp_txt_bold("Translational Parameters"),                         # bold header
  "  Sputum eosinophils (%), per 10-fold",
  "  Sputum eotaxin-3 (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
  "  Sputum IFN-gamma (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
  "  Sputum IL-13 (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
  "  Sputum IL-4 (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
  "  Sputum IL-5 (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
  "  Sputum IL-33 (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
  "  Sputum TARC (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
  "  Sputum TNF-alpha (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
  "  Sputum TSLP (pg/mL), per 10-fold",
  "  Sputum PGD2 (pg/mL), per 10-fold"
)

# Insert NA rows in param.all to match labels
param.all_with_sections_u1 <- rbind(
  NA,                       # Clinical header
  param.all[1:13, ],        # clinical variables
  NA,                       # empty row for spacing
  NA,                       # Translational header
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA # sputum variables
)

mean_u1  <- param.all_with_sections_u1$Estimate
lower_u1 <- param.all_with_sections_u1$CI_low
upper_u1 <- param.all_with_sections_u1$CI_up

u1 <- forestplot(
  labeltext = labels_with_sections,
  mean = mean_u1,
  lower = lower_u1,
  upper = upper_u1,
  zero = 0,
  xlim = c(-2, 2),              
  xticks = seq(-2, 2, 0.5),     
  boxsize = 0.2,
  lineheight = "auto",
  col = fpColors(box = "black", lines = "black"),
  xlab = "",
  fn.ci_norm = fpDrawNormalCI,
  txt_gp = fpTxtGp(label = gpar(cex=1), ticks = gpar(cex = 0.8)),
  align = c("l", "l")
)


#tableparam to extract values in tables
tableparam1 <- param.all22

```

```{r, echo = FALSE, include=FALSE}
# -----------------------------
# Severe Asthma - Iterative Adjustment Strategy
# -----------------------------

Data.raw.raspuk$Smoking_cat <- ifelse(Data.raw.raspuk$Smoking_status_0nil_1ex_2active == "Never", 0, 1)

# Base adjustment variables
base_vars <- "BEC_log10 + FeNO_log10 + FEV1_PCTpredicted_rescale10"
base_var_names <- c("BEC_log10", "FeNO_log10", "FEV1_PCTpredicted_rescale10")

# Clinical parameters in order
clinical_vars <- c("age_rescale10", "Sex0M1F", "BMI_rescale5", 
                   "BEC_log10", "FeNO_log10", "FEV1_PCTpredicted_rescale10",
                   "FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10", "Previous_asthma_attack_yesno", "Smoking_cat")

# Translational parameters
translational_vars <- c("Sp_Eos_optimised_log10", "Eotaxin_3_Optimised_sputm_log10", 
                        "IFNgamma_Optimised_sputm_log10", "IL13_Optimised_sputm_log10", 
                        "IL33_Optimised_sputm_log10", "IL4_Optimised_sputm_log10", 
                        "IL5_Optimised_sputm_log10", "TARC_Optimised_sputm_log10", 
                        "TNFalpha_Optimised_sputm_log10", "TSLP_Optimised_sputm_log10", 
                        "PGD2_Optimised_sputm_log10")

# Fit base model
mod_base <- lm(as.formula(paste("ACQ_optimised ~", base_vars)), data = Data.raw.raspuk)

# Extract results for clinical parameters
results_clinical <- lapply(seq_along(clinical_vars), function(i) {
  var <- clinical_vars[i]
  
  if (var %in% base_var_names) {
    mod <- mod_base
    coef_idx <- which(names(coef(mod)) == var)
  } else {
    formula_str <- paste("ACQ_optimised ~", base_vars, "+", var)
    mod <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = Data.raw.raspuk)
    coef_idx <- length(coef(mod))
  }
  
  ci <- confint(mod)[coef_idx, ]
  pval <- summary(mod)$coefficients[coef_idx, 4]
  
  n_analysed <- nobs(mod)
  n_missing  <- nrow(Data.raw.raspuk) - n_analysed
  
  data.frame(
    Estimate = coef(mod)[coef_idx],
    `2.5 %` = ci[1],
    `97.5 %` = ci[2],
    p_value = pval,
    N_analysed = n_analysed,
    N_missing = n_missing,
    check.names = FALSE
  )
})

# Extract results for translational parameters
results_translational <- lapply(seq_along(translational_vars), function(i) {
  var <- translational_vars[i]
  
  formula_str <- paste("ACQ_optimised ~", base_vars, "+", var)
  mod <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = Data.raw.raspuk)
  coef_idx <- length(coef(mod))
  
  ci <- confint(mod)[coef_idx, ]
  pval <- summary(mod)$coefficients[coef_idx, 4]
  
  n_analysed <- nobs(mod)
  n_missing  <- nrow(Data.raw.raspuk) - n_analysed
  
  data.frame(
    Estimate = coef(mod)[coef_idx],
    `2.5 %` = ci[1],
    `97.5 %` = ci[2],
    p_value = pval,
    N_analysed = n_analysed,
    N_missing = n_missing,
    check.names = FALSE
  )
})

# Combine results
param1 <- do.call(rbind, results_clinical)
param2 <- do.call(rbind, results_translational)
param <- rbind(param1, param2)

# Insert NA rows to match structure
param.all_u2 <- rbind(
  NA,
  param[1:3, ],
  NA,
  param[4:9, ],
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  param[10:nrow(param), ]
)

mean_u2  <- param.all_u2$Estimate
lower_u2 <- param.all_u2$`2.5 %`
upper_u2 <- param.all_u2$`97.5 %`

labels_empty <- rep("", length(mean_u2))

u2 <- forestplot(
  labeltext = labels_empty,
  mean = mean_u2,
  lower = lower_u2,
  upper = upper_u2,
  zero = 0,
  xlim = c(-2, 2),              
  xticks = seq(-2, 2, 0.5),     
  boxsize = 0.2,
  lineheight = "auto",
  col = fpColors(box = "black", lines = "black"),
  xlab = "",
  fn.ci_norm = fpDrawNormalCI,
  txt_gp = fpTxtGp(label = gpar(cex=1), ticks = gpar(cex = 0.8)),
  align = c("l", "l")
)

#tableparam to extract values in tables
tableparam2 <- param

```

```{r, echo = FALSE, include=FALSE}
# -----------------------------
# PRISMA - Iterative Adjustment Strategy
# -----------------------------

# Base adjustment variables
base_vars <- "BloodEOS_Abso_log10 + FeNO_log10 + Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale"
base_var_names <- c("BloodEOS_Abso_log10", "FeNO_log10", "Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale")

# Clinical parameters in order
clinical_vars <- c("Age_at_study_enrollment_rescale10", "Sex", "BMI_rescale5", "GINA_Step",
                   "BloodEOS_Abso_log10", "FeNO_log10", "Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale",
                   "Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale", "Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat",
                   "Tobacco", "Rhinitis_cat", "CRSsNP", "CRSwNP")

# Translational parameters
translational_vars <- c("SpuEOS_PCT_log10", "PBS_EOTAX_log10", "PBS_IFNg_log10",
                        "PBS_IL13_log10", "PBS_IL4_log10", "PBS_IL5_log10",
                        "PBS_IL33_log10", "PBS_TARC_log10", "PBS_TNFa_log10",
                        "PBS_TSLP_log10", "PBS_PGD2_log10")

# Fit base model
mod_base <- lm(as.formula(paste("acq5_moy ~", base_vars)), data = Data.Prisma)

# Extract results for clinical parameters
results_clinical <- lapply(seq_along(clinical_vars), function(i) {
  var <- clinical_vars[i]
  
  if (var %in% base_var_names) {
    mod <- mod_base
    coef_idx <- which(names(coef(mod)) == var)
  } else {
    formula_str <- paste("acq5_moy ~", base_vars, "+", var)
    mod <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = Data.Prisma)
    coef_idx <- length(coef(mod))
  }
  
  ci <- confint(mod)[coef_idx, ]
  pval <- summary(mod)$coefficients[coef_idx, 4]
  
  n_analysed <- nobs(mod)
  n_missing  <- nrow(Data.Prisma) - n_analysed
  
  data.frame(
    Estimate = coef(mod)[coef_idx],
    `2.5 %` = ci[1],
    `97.5 %` = ci[2],
    p_value = pval,
    N_analysed = n_analysed,
    N_missing = n_missing,
    check.names = FALSE
  )
})

# Extract results for translational parameters
results_translational <- lapply(seq_along(translational_vars), function(i) {
  var <- translational_vars[i]
  
  formula_str <- paste("acq5_moy ~", base_vars, "+", var)
  mod <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = Data.Prisma)
  coef_idx <- length(coef(mod))
  
  ci <- confint(mod)[coef_idx, ]
  pval <- summary(mod)$coefficients[coef_idx, 4]
  
  n_analysed <- nobs(mod)
  n_missing  <- nrow(Data.Prisma) - n_analysed
  
  data.frame(
    Estimate = coef(mod)[coef_idx],
    `2.5 %` = ci[1],
    `97.5 %` = ci[2],
    p_value = pval,
    N_analysed = n_analysed,
    N_missing = n_missing,
    check.names = FALSE
  )
})

# Combine results
param1 <- do.call(rbind, results_clinical)
param2 <- do.call(rbind, results_translational)
param <- rbind(param1, param2)

# Insert NA rows to match structure
param.all_u3 <- rbind(
  NA,
  param[1:13, ],
  NA,
  NA,
  param[14:nrow(param), ]
)

mean_u3  <- param.all_u3$Estimate
lower_u3 <- param.all_u3$`2.5 %`
upper_u3 <- param.all_u3$`97.5 %`

labels_empty_u3 <- rep("", length(mean_u3))

u3 <- forestplot(
  labeltext = labels_empty_u3,
  mean = mean_u3,
  lower = lower_u3,
  upper = upper_u3,
  zero = 0,
  xlim = c(-2, 2),              
  xticks = seq(-2, 2, 0.5),     
  boxsize = 0.2,
  lineheight = "auto",
  col = fpColors(box = "black", lines = "black"),
  xlab = "",
  fn.ci_norm = fpDrawNormalCI,
  txt_gp = fpTxtGp(label = gpar(cex=1), ticks = gpar(cex = 0.8)),
  align = c("l", "l")
)

#tableparam to extract values in tables
tableparam3 <- param

```

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# -----------------------------
# BOOST - Iterative Adjustment Strategy
# -----------------------------

# Base adjustment variables
base_vars <- "BEC_log10 + FeNO_log10 + Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale"
base_var_names <- c("BEC_log10", "FeNO_log10", "Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale")

# Clinical parameters in order
clinical_vars <- c("Age_rescale10", "Sex", "BMI_rescale5",
                   "BEC_log10", "FeNO_log10", "Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale",
                   "Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale", "Previous_asthma_attack_yesno",
                   "smoking_status", "Allergic_rhinitis", "CRSsNP", "CRSwNP")

# Translational parameters
translational_vars <- c("SpuEOS_PCT_log10")

# Fit base model
mod_base <- lm(as.formula(paste("acq_attack ~", base_vars)), data = Data.boost)

# Extract results for clinical parameters
results_clinical <- lapply(seq_along(clinical_vars), function(i) {
  var <- clinical_vars[i]
  
  if (var %in% base_var_names) {
    mod <- mod_base
    coef_idx <- which(names(coef(mod)) == var)
  } else {
    formula_str <- paste("acq_attack ~", base_vars, "+", var)
    mod <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = Data.boost)
    coef_idx <- length(coef(mod))
  }
  
  ci <- confint(mod)[coef_idx, ]
  pval <- summary(mod)$coefficients[coef_idx, 4]
  
  n_analysed <- nobs(mod)
  n_missing  <- nrow(Data.boost) - n_analysed
  
  data.frame(
    Estimate = coef(mod)[coef_idx],
    `2.5 %` = ci[1],
    `97.5 %` = ci[2],
    p_value = pval,
    N_analysed = n_analysed,
    N_missing = n_missing,
    check.names = FALSE
  )
})

# Extract results for translational parameters
results_translational <- lapply(seq_along(translational_vars), function(i) {
  var <- translational_vars[i]
  
  formula_str <- paste("acq_attack ~", base_vars, "+", var)
  mod <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = Data.boost)
  coef_idx <- length(coef(mod))
  
  ci <- confint(mod)[coef_idx, ]
  pval <- summary(mod)$coefficients[coef_idx, 4]
  
  n_analysed <- nobs(mod)
  n_missing  <- nrow(Data.boost) - n_analysed
  
  data.frame(
    Estimate = coef(mod)[coef_idx],
    `2.5 %` = ci[1],
    `97.5 %` = ci[2],
    p_value = pval,
    N_analysed = n_analysed,
    N_missing = n_missing,
    check.names = FALSE
  )
})

# Combine results
param1 <- do.call(rbind, results_clinical)
param2 <- do.call(rbind, results_translational)
param <- rbind(param1, param2)


# Insert NA rows to match structure
param.all_with_sections_u4 <- rbind(
  NA,                       # Clinical header
  param1[1:3, ],
  NA,
  param1[4:12, ],
  NA,                       # empty row for spacing
  NA,                       # Translational header
  param2[1, ],             # Sputum eosinophils
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA,
  NA                        # remaining sputum variables (as NA)
)

mean_u4  <- param.all_with_sections_u4$Estimate
lower_u4 <- param.all_with_sections_u4$`2.5 %`
upper_u4 <- param.all_with_sections_u4$`97.5 %`

mean_u4 <- ifelse(mean_u4 > 2, 2, mean_u4)
upper_u4 <- ifelse(upper_u4 > 2, 2, upper_u4)
lower_u4 <- ifelse(lower_u4 < -2, -2, lower_u4)

labels_empty_u4 <- rep("", length(mean_u4))

u4 <- forestplot(
  labeltext = labels_empty_u4,
  mean = mean_u4,
  lower = lower_u4,
  upper = upper_u4,
  zero = 0,
  xlim = c(-2, 2),              
  xticks = seq(-2, 2, 0.5),     
  boxsize = 0.2,
  lineheight = "auto",
  col = fpColors(box = "black", lines = "black"),
  xlab = "",
  fn.ci_norm = fpDrawNormalCI,
  txt_gp = fpTxtGp(label = gpar(cex=1), ticks = gpar(cex = 0.8)),
  align = c("l", "l")
)

#tableparam to extract values in tables
tableparam4 <- param

```


```{r, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}

# manual extraction of Forest Plot values for each studies

colnames(tableparam1) <- c("Estimate", "CI_low", "CI_high", 
                           "P_value", "N_analysed", "N_missing")

colnames(tableparam2) <- colnames(tableparam1)
colnames(tableparam3) <- colnames(tableparam1)
colnames(tableparam4) <- colnames(tableparam1)

tableparam1$Model <- "ORACLE2 - Any-ACQ"
tableparam2$Model <- "Severe Asthma"
tableparam3$Model <- "PRISMA"
tableparam4$Model <- "BOOST"

supp_table <- rbind(
  tableparam1,
  tableparam2,
  tableparam3,
  tableparam4
)

supp_table$CI <- paste0(
  round(supp_table$CI_low, 2),
  " to ",
  round(supp_table$CI_high, 2)
)

supp_table_final <- supp_table[, c("Model",
                                   "Estimate",
                                   "CI",
                                   "P_value",
                                   "N_analysed",
                                   "N_missing")]


write.xlsx(supp_table_final,
           file = "Supplementary_Table.xlsx",
           rowNames = T)

```

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.height = 8, fig.width = 14}
# Open PDF device - save to current working directory
pdf("master_forest_plot.pdf", width = 14, height = 8)

grid.newpage()
pushViewport(viewport(
  layout = grid.layout(
    nrow = 2,
    ncol = 4,
    widths = unit(c(2.1, 1, 1, 1), "null"),  
    heights = unit(c(0.95, 0.05), "npc")      
  )
))

draw_fp <- function(fp, col) {
  pushViewport(viewport(
    layout.pos.row = 1,  
    layout.pos.col = col,
    xscale = c(-2, 2),
    width = unit(0.95, "npc")
  ))
  print(fp)
  popViewport()
}

draw_fp(u1, 1)
draw_fp(u2, 2)
draw_fp(u3, 3)
draw_fp(u4, 4)

# Text headers
grid.text(
  "A) ORACLE2 - Any ACQ",
  x = 0.25,
  y = 0.99,
  just = c("left", "top"),
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold", col = "black")
)

grid.text(
  "B) Severe Asthma",
  x = 0.47,
  y = 0.99,
  just = c("left", "top"),
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold", col = "black")
)

grid.text(
  "C) PRISMA",
  x = 0.68,
  y = 0.99,
  just = c("left", "top"),
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold", col = "black")
)

grid.text(
  "D) BOOST",
  x = 0.88,
  y = 0.99,
  just = c("left", "top"),
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold", col = "black")
)

grid.text(
  "Adjusted RC",                       
  x = 0.78,                          
  y = 0.5,                           
  just = "center",                   
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold", col = "black"),
  vp = viewport(layout.pos.row = 2, layout.pos.col = 1)
)

grid.text(
  "Adjusted RC",                       
  x = 0.59,                          
  y = 0.5,                           
  just = "center",                   
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold", col = "black"),
  vp = viewport(layout.pos.row = 2, layout.pos.col = 2)
)

grid.text(
  "Adjusted RC",                       
  x = 0.59,                          
  y = 0.5,                           
  just = "center",                   
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold", col = "black"),
  vp = viewport(layout.pos.row = 2, layout.pos.col = 3)
)

grid.text(
  "Adjusted RC",                       
  x = 0.59,                          
  y = 0.5,                           
  just = "center",                   
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold", col = "black"),
  vp = viewport(layout.pos.row = 2, layout.pos.col = 4)
)

# Close PDF device
dev.off()

# Now display the same plot in RMarkdown
grid.newpage()
pushViewport(viewport(
  layout = grid.layout(
    nrow = 2,
    ncol = 4,
    widths = unit(c(2.1, 1, 1, 1), "null"),  
    heights = unit(c(0.95, 0.05), "npc")      
  )
))

draw_fp(u1, 1)
draw_fp(u2, 2)
draw_fp(u3, 3)
draw_fp(u4, 4)

# Text headers (repeat for display)
grid.text(
  "A) ORACLE2 - Any ACQ",
  x = 0.25,
  y = 0.99,
  just = c("left", "top"),
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold", col = "black")
)

grid.text(
  "B) Severe Asthma",
  x = 0.47,
  y = 0.99,
  just = c("left", "top"),
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold", col = "black")
)

grid.text(
  "C) PRISMA",
  x = 0.68,
  y = 0.99,
  just = c("left", "top"),
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold", col = "black")
)

grid.text(
  "D) BOOST",
  x = 0.88,
  y = 0.99,
  just = c("left", "top"),
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold", col = "black")
)

grid.text(
  "Adjusted RC",                       
  x = 0.78,                          
  y = 0.5,                           
  just = "center",                   
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold", col = "black"),
  vp = viewport(layout.pos.row = 2, layout.pos.col = 1)
)

grid.text(
  "Adjusted RC",                       
  x = 0.59,                          
  y = 0.5,                           
  just = "center",                   
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold", col = "black"),
  vp = viewport(layout.pos.row = 2, layout.pos.col = 2)
)

grid.text(
  "Adjusted RC",                       
  x = 0.59,                          
  y = 0.5,                           
  just = "center",                   
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold", col = "black"),
  vp = viewport(layout.pos.row = 2, layout.pos.col = 3)
)

grid.text(
  "Adjusted RC",                       
  x = 0.59,                          
  y = 0.5,                           
  just = "center",                   
  gp = gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold", col = "black"),
  vp = viewport(layout.pos.row = 2, layout.pos.col = 4)
)
```

# Forestplot : Subgroups {.tabset .tabset-fade}

## Oracle Dream {.tabset .tabset-fade}

### Unadjusted

```{r, echo = FALSE}

# Data with groups for ACQ, FeNO, Eos; group1 < Q1, Q1 < group2 < Q3, group3 > Q3
Data.sg.dream <- Data.oracle.dream %>% 
  dplyr::select(Subject_ID, Mepo_placebo, ACQ_baseline_score_mean, FeNO_baseline_ppb, Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L, Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, Follow_up_duration_days, T2_composite) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Mepo_placebo)) %>% 
  mutate(
    ACQ_group = ifelse(ACQ_baseline_score_mean < quantile(ACQ_baseline_score_mean, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE), 1,
                ifelse(ACQ_baseline_score_mean <= quantile(ACQ_baseline_score_mean, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE), 2,3)),
    FeNO_group = ifelse(FeNO_baseline_ppb < quantile(FeNO_baseline_ppb, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE), 1,
                 ifelse(FeNO_baseline_ppb <= quantile(FeNO_baseline_ppb, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE), 2,3)),
    Eos_group = ifelse(Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L < quantile(Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE), 1,
                ifelse(Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L <= quantile(Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE), 2,3)),
  )

# Table1 to see Q1 and Q3
#table1( ~ ACQ_baseline_score_mean + FeNO_baseline_ppb + Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L + ACQ_group + FeNO_group + Eos_group | Mepo_placebo, data = Data.sg.dream, render.continuous=c(.="Mean (SD)", .="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), render.categorical="FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", topclass="Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")

Data.sg.dream$ACQ_group <- as.factor(Data.sg.dream$ACQ_group)
Data.sg.dream$FeNO_group <- as.factor(Data.sg.dream$FeNO_group)
Data.sg.dream$Eos_group <- as.factor(Data.sg.dream$Eos_group)

# Negative binomial regressions for each group
mod0 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream)
mod1 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = ACQ_group == 1)
mod2 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = ACQ_group == 2)
mod3 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = ACQ_group == 3)
mod4 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = FeNO_group == 1)
mod5 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = FeNO_group == 2)
mod6 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = FeNO_group == 3)
mod7 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = Eos_group == 1)
mod8 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = Eos_group == 2)
mod9 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = Eos_group == 3)
mod10 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = T2_composite == 'T2-Low/Low')
mod11 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = T2_composite == 'T2-Mid')
mod12 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = T2_composite == 'T2-High/High')


# Coefficients and interval confidence for all regressions
coef <- round(rbind("Overall" = exp(Confint(mod0)[-1,]), NA,
                    "ACQ_1" = exp(Confint(mod1)[-1,]), "ACQ_2" = exp(Confint(mod2)[-1,]), "ACQ_3" = exp(Confint(mod3)[-1,]), NA, 
                    "Eos_1" = exp(Confint(mod7)[-1,]), "Eos_2" = exp(Confint(mod8)[-1,]), "Eos_3" = exp(Confint(mod9)[-1,]), NA,
                    "FeNO_1" = exp(Confint(mod4)[-1,]), "FeNO_2" = exp(Confint(mod5)[-1,]), "FeNO_3" = exp(Confint(mod6)[-1,]), NA,
                    "T2_1" = exp(Confint(mod10)[-1,]), "T2_2" = exp(Confint(mod11)[-1,]), "T2_3" = exp(Confint(mod12)[-1,])), 2)

# Data with min/max for each group ACQ
Data_attack_acq <- Data.sg.dream %>% 
  filter(!is.na(ACQ_group)) %>% 
  group_by(Mepo_placebo, ACQ_group) %>% 
  reframe(
    n = n(),
    # Median = median(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE), 
    # Q1 = quantile(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Q3 = quantile(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    Cat = "ACQ",
    .before = 1
  ) %>% 
  rename(group = ACQ_group)

# Data with min/max for each group FeNO
Data_attack_FeNO <- Data.sg.dream %>% 
  filter(!is.na(FeNO_group)) %>% 
  group_by(Mepo_placebo, FeNO_group) %>% 
  reframe(
    n = n(),
    # Median = median(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE), 
    # Q1 = quantile(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Q3 = quantile(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    Cat = "FeNO",
    .before = 1
  ) %>% 
  rename(group = FeNO_group)

# Data with min/max for each group Eos
Data_attack_Eos <- Data.sg.dream %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Eos_group)) %>% 
  group_by(Mepo_placebo, Eos_group) %>% 
  reframe(
    n = n(),
    # Median = median(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE), 
    # Q1 = quantile(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Q3 = quantile(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    Cat = "Eos",
    .before = 1
  ) %>% 
  rename(group = Eos_group)

# Data with min/max for each group T2
Data_attack_T2 <- Data.sg.dream %>% 
  filter(!is.na(T2_composite)) %>% 
  group_by(Mepo_placebo, T2_composite) %>% 
  reframe(
    n = n(),
    # Median = median(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE), 
    # Q1 = quantile(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Q3 = quantile(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    Cat = "Eos",
    .before = 1
  ) %>% 
  rename(group = T2_composite)

Data_attack_ff100 <- rbind(Data_attack_acq, Data_attack_Eos, Data_attack_FeNO,Data_attack_T2) %>% 
  filter(Mepo_placebo == "Placebo") %>% 
  add_row(Cat = "Overall", Mepo_placebo = "Placebo", group = "Overall", n = sum(Data.sg.dream$Mepo_placebo == "Placebo"), Min = min(Data.oracle.dream$Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup[Data.sg.dream$Mepo_placebo == "Placebo"], na.rm = TRUE), Max = max(Data.oracle.dream$Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup[Data.sg.dream$Mepo_placebo == "Placebo"], na.rm = TRUE),.before = 1) %>% 
  add_row(.before = 2) %>% 
  add_row(.after = 5) %>% 
  add_row(.after = 9) %>% 
  add_row(.after = 13) 

Data_attack_ff200 <- rbind(Data_attack_acq, Data_attack_Eos, Data_attack_FeNO,Data_attack_T2) %>% 
  filter(Mepo_placebo == "Mepo") %>% 
  add_row(Cat = "Overall", Mepo_placebo = "Mepo", group = "Overall", n = sum(Data.sg.dream$Mepo_placebo == "Mepo"), Min = min(Data.oracle.dream$Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup[Data.sg.dream$Mepo_placebo == "Mepo"], na.rm = TRUE), Max = max(Data.oracle.dream$Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup[Data.sg.dream$Mepo_placebo == "Mepo"], na.rm = TRUE),.before = 1) %>% 
  add_row(.before = 2) %>% 
  add_row(.after = 5) %>% 
  add_row(.after = 9) %>% 
  add_row(.after = 13)  

mydf <- data.frame(
  SubgroupH = c("Overall", "ACQ", NA, NA, NA, "Blood eos", NA, NA, NA, "FeNO", NA, NA, NA, "T2 ordinal", NA, NA, NA),
  Subgroup = c(NA, NA, "< Q1 (1.6)", "[Q1 - Q3]", "> Q3 (3.2)", NA, "< Q1 (0.15)", "[Q1 - Q3]", "> Q3 (0.51)", NA, "< Q1 (18)", "[Q1 - Q3]", "> Q3 (56)", NA, "LowLow", "Mid", "HotHot"),
  NoOfPatients_FF100 = Data_attack_ff100$n,
  NoOfPatients_FF200 = Data_attack_ff200$n,
  FF100 = ifelse(is.na(Data_attack_ff100$Min), NA, paste0(Data_attack_ff100$Min, " - ", Data_attack_ff100$Max)),
  FF200 = ifelse(is.na(Data_attack_ff200$Min), NA, paste0(Data_attack_ff200$Min, " - ", Data_attack_ff200$Max)),
  RateRatio = coef[,1],
  RateLower = coef[,2],
  RateUpper = coef[,3],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Data frame in log for the forest plot
df <- mydf %>%
  mutate(
    row = seq(n(), 1),
    logRR = log(RateRatio),
    logLower = log(RateLower),
    logUpper = log(RateUpper),
    SubgroupH = ifelse(is.na(SubgroupH), "", SubgroupH),
    Subgroup = ifelse(is.na(Subgroup), "", Subgroup),
    pat100 = ifelse(is.na(NoOfPatients_FF100), "", format(NoOfPatients_FF100, big.mark=",")),
    pat200 = ifelse(is.na(NoOfPatients_FF200), "", format(NoOfPatients_FF200, big.mark=",")),
    textRR = ifelse(!is.na(RateRatio), paste0(RateRatio, " (", RateLower, "-", RateUpper, ")"), "")
  )

```

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 8, warning = FALSE}

ticks  <- log(c(0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4))
labels <- c("0.25", "0.5", "1", "2", "4")

p_dream <- ggplot(df, aes(x = logRR, y = row)) +
  
  # Confidence interval
  geom_segment(aes(x = logLower, xend = logUpper,
                   y = row, yend = row)) +
  
  # RR points
  geom_point(size = 3, shape = 15) +
  
  # Vertical line for RR = 1
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = 0, y = 18.5, yend = 0),
               linetype = 3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # Vertical line for 0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4
  # geom_segment(
  #   data = data.frame(x = ticks),
  #   aes(x = x, xend = x, y = 13.5, yend = 0),
  #   linetype = 3,
  #   inherit.aes = FALSE
  # ) +
  
  # X axis 
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = ticks,
    labels = labels,
    limits = c(-8, 4)
  ) +
  
  # Graduations of the X axis
  geom_segment(
    data = data.frame(x = ticks),
    aes(x = x, xend = x, y = 0, yend = -0.4),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = min(ticks), xend = max(ticks), y = 0, yend = 0),
               inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # Labels
  geom_text(
    data = data.frame(x = ticks, lab = labels),
    aes(x = x, y = -0.8, label = lab),
    size = 3,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  
  # Y axis
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-3, 22), expand = c(0,0)) +
  
  # Themes
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()
  )

# Add text to the plot
p_dream <- p_dream +
  
  # Subgroups (left column)
  geom_text(aes(x = -8, label = SubgroupH), hjust = 0, fontface = "italic") +
  geom_text(aes(x = -7.7, label = Subgroup), hjust = 0) +
  
  # Number of patients Placebo/Mepo
  geom_text(aes(x = -4.8, label = pat100), hjust = 1) +
  geom_text(aes(x = -2.8, label = pat200), hjust = 1) +
  
  # Rate ratio
  geom_text(aes(x = 1.8, label = textRR), hjust = 0) +
  
  # Column titles
  annotate("text", x = -8, y = 20, label = "Subgroup", hjust = 0, fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = -3.2, y = 21, label = "No. of Patients", hjust = 1, fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = -4.7, y = 20, label = "Placebo", hjust = 1, fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = -2.7, y = 20, label = "Mepo", hjust = 1, fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.5,  y = 20, label = "Rate Ratio (95% CI)", hjust = 0, fontface = 2) +
  
  # Favors Placebo/Mepo
  annotate("text", x = -1.5, y = -2, label = "Favors Mepo", fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x =  1.5, y = -2, label = "Favors Placebo", fontface = 2) 

p_dream

```

### Adjusted

Adjusted for same variables as SPLINE curves (Full multivariable). When possible interaction of FeNO and BEC were included. For T2, need to remove BEC and FeNO from model.

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# Data with groups for ACQ, FeNO, Eos; group1 < Q1, Q1 < group2 < Q3, group3 > Q3
Data.sg.dream <- Data.oracle.dream %>% 
  dplyr::select(Subject_ID, Mepo_placebo, ACQ_baseline_score_mean, FeNO_baseline_ppb, Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L, Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, Follow_up_duration_days,Age_rescale10, Gender_0Female_1Male, BMI_rescale5, FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10, Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10, Smoking_0never_1ex_2current, CRSsNP, CRSwNP, T2_composite ) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Mepo_placebo)) %>% 
  mutate(
    ACQ_group = ifelse(ACQ_baseline_score_mean < quantile(ACQ_baseline_score_mean, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE), 1,
                ifelse(ACQ_baseline_score_mean <= quantile(ACQ_baseline_score_mean, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE), 2,3)),
    FeNO_group = ifelse(FeNO_baseline_ppb < quantile(FeNO_baseline_ppb, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE), 1,
                 ifelse(FeNO_baseline_ppb <= quantile(FeNO_baseline_ppb, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE), 2,3)),
    Eos_group = ifelse(Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L < quantile(Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE), 1,
                ifelse(Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L <= quantile(Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE), 2,3)),
  )

# Table1 to see Q1 and Q3
#table1( ~ ACQ_baseline_score_mean + FeNO_baseline_ppb + Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L + ACQ_group + FeNO_group + Eos_group | Mepo_placebo, data = Data.sg.dream, render.continuous=c(.="Mean (SD)", .="Median [Q1 - Q3]"), render.categorical="FREQ (PCTnoNA%)", topclass="Rtable1-grid Rtable1-shade Rtable1-times")

Data.sg.dream$ACQ_group <- as.factor(Data.sg.dream$ACQ_group)
Data.sg.dream$FeNO_group <- as.factor(Data.sg.dream$FeNO_group)
Data.sg.dream$Eos_group <- as.factor(Data.sg.dream$Eos_group)

# Negative binomial regressions for each group
mod0 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream)
mod1 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + FeNO_baseline_ppb*Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = ACQ_group == 1)
mod2 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + FeNO_baseline_ppb*Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = ACQ_group == 2)
mod3 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + FeNO_baseline_ppb*Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = ACQ_group == 3)
mod4 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + ACQ_baseline_score_mean + Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = FeNO_group == 1)
mod5 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + ACQ_baseline_score_mean + Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = FeNO_group == 2)
mod6 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + ACQ_baseline_score_mean + Blood_Eos_baseline_x10_9_cells_per_L + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = FeNO_group == 3)
mod7 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + ACQ_baseline_score_mean + FeNO_baseline_ppb + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = Eos_group == 1)
mod8 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + ACQ_baseline_score_mean + FeNO_baseline_ppb + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = Eos_group == 2)
mod9 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + ACQ_baseline_score_mean + FeNO_baseline_ppb + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = Eos_group == 3)
mod10 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + ACQ_baseline_score_mean  + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = T2_composite == 'T2-Low/Low')
mod11 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + ACQ_baseline_score_mean  + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = T2_composite == 'T2-Mid')
mod12 <- glm.nb(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup ~ Mepo_placebo + ACQ_baseline_score_mean  + Age_rescale10 + Gender_0Female_1Male + BMI_rescale5 + FEV1_preBD_PCT_Baseline_rescale10 + Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale10 + Smoking_0never_1ex_2current + CRSsNP + CRSwNP + offset(log(Follow_up_duration_days)), data = Data.sg.dream, subset = T2_composite == 'T2-High/High')


# Coefficients and interval confidence for all regressions
coef <- round(rbind("Overall" = exp(Confint(mod0)[2,]), NA,
                    "ACQ_1" = exp(Confint(mod1)[2,]), "ACQ_2" = exp(Confint(mod2)[2,]), "ACQ_3" = exp(Confint(mod3)[2,]), NA, 
                    "Eos_1" = exp(Confint(mod7)[2,]), "Eos_2" = exp(Confint(mod8)[2,]), "Eos_3" = exp(Confint(mod9)[2,]), NA,
                    "FeNO_1" = exp(Confint(mod4)[2,]), "FeNO_2" = exp(Confint(mod5)[2,]), "FeNO_3" = exp(Confint(mod6)[2,]), NA,
                    "T2_1" = exp(Confint(mod10)[2,]), "T2_2" = exp(Confint(mod11)[2,]), "T2_3" = exp(Confint(mod12)[2,])), 2)


# Data with min/max for each group ACQ
Data_attack_acq <- Data.sg.dream %>% 
  filter(!is.na(ACQ_group)) %>% 
  group_by(Mepo_placebo, ACQ_group) %>% 
  reframe(
    n = n(),
    AbsRisk = sum(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE) /
              (sum(Follow_up_duration_days, na.rm = TRUE) / 365.25),
    # Median = median(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE), 
    # Q1 = quantile(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Q3 = quantile(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    Cat = "ACQ",
    .before = 1
  ) %>% 
  rename(group = ACQ_group)

# Data with min/max for each group FeNO
Data_attack_FeNO <- Data.sg.dream %>% 
  filter(!is.na(FeNO_group)) %>% 
  group_by(Mepo_placebo, FeNO_group) %>% 
  reframe(
    n = n(),
    AbsRisk = sum(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE) /
              (sum(Follow_up_duration_days, na.rm = TRUE) / 365.25),
    # Median = median(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE), 
    # Q1 = quantile(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Q3 = quantile(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    Cat = "FeNO",
    .before = 1
  ) %>% 
  rename(group = FeNO_group)

# Data with min/max for each group Eos
Data_attack_Eos <- Data.sg.dream %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Eos_group)) %>% 
  group_by(Mepo_placebo, Eos_group) %>% 
  reframe(
    n = n(),
    AbsRisk = sum(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE) /
              (sum(Follow_up_duration_days, na.rm = TRUE) / 365.25),
    # Median = median(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE), 
    # Q1 = quantile(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Q3 = quantile(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    Cat = "Eos",
    .before = 1
  ) %>%
```
