```{r, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE}
  rename(group = Eos_group)


# Data with min/max for each group T2
Data_attack_T2 <- Data.sg.dream %>% 
  filter(!is.na(T2_composite)) %>% 
  group_by(Mepo_placebo, T2_composite) %>% 
  reframe(
    n = n(),
    AbsRisk = sum(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE) /
              (sum(Follow_up_duration_days, na.rm = TRUE) / 365.25),
    # Median = median(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE), 
    # Q1 = quantile(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Q3 = quantile(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup, na.rm = TRUE),
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    Cat = "Eos",
    .before = 1
  ) %>% 
  rename(group = T2_composite)


Data_attack_placebo <- rbind(Data_attack_acq, Data_attack_Eos, Data_attack_FeNO,Data_attack_T2) %>% 
  filter(Mepo_placebo == "Placebo") %>% 
  add_row(Cat = "Overall", Mepo_placebo = "Placebo", group = "Overall", n = sum(Data.sg.dream$Mepo_placebo == "Placebo"), Min = min(Data.oracle.dream$Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup[Data.sg.dream$Mepo_placebo == "Placebo"], na.rm = TRUE), Max = max(Data.oracle.dream$Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup[Data.sg.dream$Mepo_placebo == "Placebo"], na.rm = TRUE),.before = 1) %>% 
  add_row(.before = 2) %>% 
  add_row(.after = 5) %>% 
  add_row(.after = 9) %>% 
  add_row(.after = 13) 

Data_attack_mepo <- rbind(Data_attack_acq, Data_attack_Eos, Data_attack_FeNO,Data_attack_T2) %>% 
  filter(Mepo_placebo == "Mepo") %>% 
  add_row(Cat = "Overall", Mepo_placebo = "Mepo", group = "Overall", n = sum(Data.sg.dream$Mepo_placebo == "Mepo"), Min = min(Data.oracle.dream$Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup[Data.sg.dream$Mepo_placebo == "Mepo"], na.rm = TRUE), Max = max(Data.oracle.dream$Number_severe_asthma_attacks_during_followup[Data.sg.dream$Mepo_placebo == "Mepo"], na.rm = TRUE),.before = 1) %>% 
  add_row(.before = 2) %>% 
  add_row(.after = 5) %>% 
  add_row(.after = 9) %>% 
  add_row(.after = 13) 

mydf <- data.frame(
  SubgroupH = c("Overall", "ACQ", NA, NA, NA, "Blood eos", NA, NA, NA, "FeNO", NA, NA, NA, "T2 ordinal", NA, NA, NA),
  Subgroup = c(NA, NA, "< Q1 (1.6)", "[Q1 - Q3]", "> Q3 (3.2)", NA, "< Q1 (0.15)", "[Q1 - Q3]", "> Q3 (0.51)", NA, "< Q1 (18)", "[Q1 - Q3]", "> Q3 (56)", NA, "LowLow", "Mid", "HotHot"),
  NoOfPatients_placebo = Data_attack_placebo$n,
  NoOfPatients_mepo = Data_attack_mepo$n,
  Placebo = ifelse(is.na(Data_attack_placebo$AbsRisk), NA, round(Data_attack_placebo$AbsRisk,2) ),
  Mepo = ifelse(is.na(Data_attack_mepo$AbsRisk), NA, round(Data_attack_mepo$AbsRisk,2) ),
  RateRatio = coef[,1],
  RateLower = coef[,2],
  RateUpper = coef[,3],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Data frame in log for the forest plot
df <- mydf %>%
  mutate(
    row = seq(n(), 1),
    logRR = log(RateRatio),
    logLower = log(RateLower),
    logUpper = log(RateUpper),
    SubgroupH = ifelse(is.na(SubgroupH), "", SubgroupH),
    Subgroup = ifelse(is.na(Subgroup), "", Subgroup),
    pat100 = ifelse(is.na(NoOfPatients_placebo), "", format(NoOfPatients_placebo, big.mark=",")),
    pat200 = ifelse(is.na(NoOfPatients_mepo), "", format(NoOfPatients_mepo, big.mark=",")),
    textRR = ifelse(!is.na(RateRatio), paste0(RateRatio, " (", RateLower, "-", RateUpper, ")"), "")
  )

df$Placebo <- ifelse(df$SubgroupH == 'Overall', 2.11, df$Placebo)
df$Mepo <- ifelse(df$SubgroupH == 'Overall', 1.19, df$Mepo)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    lab_placebo = ifelse(
      is.na(pat100) | is.na(Placebo),
      "",
      paste0(pat100, " (", sprintf("%.2f", Placebo), ")")
    ),
    lab_mepo = ifelse(
      is.na(pat200) | is.na(Mepo),
      "",
      paste0(pat200, " (", sprintf("%.2f", Mepo), ")")
    )
  )


```

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 9, warning = FALSE}


ticks  <- log(c(0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4))
labels <- c("0.25", "0.5", "1", "2", "4")

p_dream_adjusted <- ggplot(df, aes(x = logRR, y = row)) +
  
  # Confidence interval
  geom_segment(aes(x = logLower, xend = logUpper,
                   y = row, yend = row)) +
  
  # RR points
  geom_point(size = 3, shape = 15) +
  
  # Vertical line for RR = 1
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = 0, y = 18.5, yend = 0),
               linetype = 3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # Vertical line for 0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, 4
  # geom_segment(
  #   data = data.frame(x = ticks),
  #   aes(x = x, xend = x, y = 13.5, yend = 0),
  #   linetype = 3,
  #   inherit.aes = FALSE
  # ) +
  
  # X axis 
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = ticks,
    labels = labels,
    limits = c(-8, 4)
  ) +
  
  # Graduations of the X axis
  geom_segment(
    data = data.frame(x = ticks),
    aes(x = x, xend = x, y = -0.1, yend = -0.4),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = min(ticks), xend = max(ticks), y = -0.1, yend = -0.1),
               inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # Labels
  geom_text(
    data = data.frame(x = ticks, lab = labels),
    aes(x = x, y = -0.8, label = lab),
    size = 3,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  
  # Y axis
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-3, 22), expand = c(0,0)) +
  
  # Themes
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()
  )

# Add text to the plot
p_dream_adjusted <- p_dream_adjusted +
  
  # Subgroups (left column)
  geom_text(aes(x = -8, label = SubgroupH), hjust = 0, fontface = "italic") +
  geom_text(aes(x = -7.7, label = Subgroup), hjust = 0) +
  
  geom_text(aes(x = -4.8, label = lab_placebo), hjust = 1) +
  geom_text(aes(x = -2.8, label = lab_mepo), hjust = 1) +
  # Rate ratio
  geom_text(aes(x = 1.8, label = textRR), hjust = 0) +
  
  # Column titles
  annotate("text", x = -8, y = 20, label = "Subgroup", hjust = 0, fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = -2.6, y = 21, label = "No. of Patients (Estimated rate)", hjust = 1, fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = -4.7, y = 20, label = "Placebo", hjust = 1, fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = -2.7, y = 20, label = "Mepo", hjust = 1, fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.5,  y = 20, label = "        Adjusted\nRate Ratio (95% CI)", hjust = 0, fontface = 2) +
  
  annotate("text", x = -1.5, y = -2, label = "Favors Mepo", fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x =  1.5, y = -2, label = "Favors Placebo", fontface = 2) 

p_dream_adjusted

```

## PRISMA {.tabset .tabset-fade}

### Unadjusted

```{r, echo = FALSE}

Data.sg.Prisma <- Data.Prisma %>% 
  dplyr::select(ID, ACQ5_rescale,acq5_moy, FeNO_log10, BloodEOS_Abso_log10, V2_V1_Post_FEV1_L, GINA_Step, Age_at_study_enrollment, Sex, BMI, Pre_FEV1_PORC, Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio, Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat, V1_Pre_FEV1_L_12m)

Q25 <- quantile(Data.sg.Prisma$acq5_moy, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
Q75 <- quantile(Data.sg.Prisma$acq5_moy, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
IQR_acq5 <- Q75 - Q25
Data.sg.Prisma$acq5_IQR <- Data.sg.Prisma$acq5_moy / IQR_acq5

# Linear regressions for each group
mod0 <- lm(V2_V1_Post_FEV1_L ~ acq5_IQR, data = Data.sg.Prisma)
mod1 <- lm(V2_V1_Post_FEV1_L ~ FeNO_log10, data = Data.sg.Prisma)
mod2 <- lm(V2_V1_Post_FEV1_L ~ BloodEOS_Abso_log10, data = Data.sg.Prisma)

# Coefficients and interval confidence for all regressions
coef <- round(rbind("Overall" = Confint(mod0)[-1,], "ACQ_2" = Confint(mod2)[-1,],
                    "ACQ_1" = Confint(mod1)[-1,]), 2)

mydf <- data.frame(
  SubgroupH = c("ACQ5 (per QIR)", 'Blood eos (per 10-fold)', "FeNO (per 10-fold)"),
  RateRatio = coef[,1],
  RateLower = coef[,2],
  RateUpper = coef[,3],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Data frame in log for the forest plot
df <- mydf %>%
  mutate(
    row = seq(n(), 1),
    logRR = RateRatio,
    logLower = RateLower,
    logUpper = RateUpper,
    SubgroupH = ifelse(is.na(SubgroupH), "", SubgroupH),
    textRR = ifelse(!is.na(RateRatio), paste0(RateRatio, " (", RateLower, "-", RateUpper, ")"), "")
  )

```

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8, warning = FALSE}

ticks  <- seq(-0.5, 1, by = 0.25)
labels <- ticks

p_prisma <- ggplot(df, aes(x = logRR, y = row)) +
  
  # Confidence interval
  geom_segment(aes(x = logLower, xend = logUpper,
                   y = row, yend = row)) +
  
  # MD points
  geom_point(size = 3, shape = 15) +
  
  # Vertical line for MD = 0
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = 0, y = 4, yend = 0),
               linetype = 3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # Graduations of the X axis
  geom_segment(
    data = data.frame(x = ticks),
    aes(x = x, xend = x, y = 0, yend = -0.4),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = min(ticks), xend = max(ticks), y = 0, yend = 0),
               inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # Labels
  geom_text(
    data = data.frame(x = ticks, lab = labels),
    aes(x = x, y = -0.6, label = lab),
    size = 3,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  
  # Y axis
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-2, 5), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-2.5, 3)) +
  
  # Themes
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()
  )

# Add text to the plot
p_prisma <- p_prisma +
  
    # title
  geom_text(aes(x = -2.5, label = SubgroupH), hjust = 0, fontface = "italic") +
  
  # Mean Diff
  geom_text(aes(x = 1.5, label = textRR), hjust = 0) +
  
  # Column titles
  annotate("text", x = -2.5, y = 4.5, label = "Variable", hjust = 0, fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.5,  y = 4.5, label = "Mean difference (95% CI)", hjust = 0, fontface = 2) +
  
  annotate("text", x = -0.5, y = -1.5, label = "Favors Less Improvement", fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x =  1.2, y = -1.5, label = "Favors Improvement", fontface = 2) 

p_prisma

```

### Adjusted - v1

One model adjusted for BEC, FeNO and FEV1 V1 (Post_FEV1_L).

```{r, echo = FALSE}

Data.sg.Prisma <- Data.Prisma %>% 
  dplyr::select(ID, ACQ5_rescale,acq5_moy, FeNO_log10,FeNO, BloodEOS_Abso_log10,BloodEOS_Abso, 
                V2_V1_Post_FEV1_L, GINA_Step, Age_at_study_enrollment, 
                Sex, BMI, Pre_FEV1_PORC, Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio, 
                Severe_asthma_attacks_past_12m_cat, Post_FEV1_L,T2_hothot_med_lowlow_ordinal)

Q25 <- quantile(Data.sg.Prisma$acq5_moy, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
Q75 <- quantile(Data.sg.Prisma$acq5_moy, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
IQR_acq5 <- Q75 - Q25
Data.sg.Prisma$acq5_IQR <- Data.sg.Prisma$acq5_moy / IQR_acq5

Q25 <- quantile(Data.sg.Prisma$FeNO, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
Q75 <- quantile(Data.sg.Prisma$FeNO, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
IQR_FeNO <- Q75 - Q25
Data.sg.Prisma$FeNO_IQR <- Data.sg.Prisma$FeNO / IQR_FeNO

Q25 <- quantile(Data.sg.Prisma$BloodEOS_Abso, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
Q75 <- quantile(Data.sg.Prisma$BloodEOS_Abso, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
IQR_BloodEOS_Abso <- Q75 - Q25
Data.sg.Prisma$BloodEOS_Abso_IQR <- Data.sg.Prisma$BloodEOS_Abso / IQR_BloodEOS_Abso

# Fit multivariable linear regression
mod_multi <- lm(V2_V1_Post_FEV1_L ~ acq5_IQR + BloodEOS_Abso_IQR + FeNO_IQR + Post_FEV1_L,
                data = Data.sg.Prisma)

mod_multi2 <- lm(V2_V1_Post_FEV1_L ~ acq5_IQR + T2_hothot_med_lowlow_ordinal + Post_FEV1_L,
                data = Data.sg.Prisma)

# Extract coefficients and 95% CIs for the predictors only
coef <- round(
  Confint(mod_multi)[c(2:4), ], 2
)

coef2 <- round(
  Confint(mod_multi2)[c(3), ], 2
)

coef <- rbind(coef,coef2)

df <- data.frame(
  SubgroupH = c("ACQ5 (per IQR 1.6)", 
                "Blood eos (per IQR 0.26)", 
                "FeNO (per IQR 26)",
                "T2 ordinal"),
  logRR    = coef[,1],
  logLower = coef[,2],
  logUpper = coef[,3],
  row      = 4:1
)

df$textRR <- paste0(df$logRR, " (", df$logLower, ", ", df$logUpper, ")")

```

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8, warning = FALSE}

ticks  <- seq(-0.5, 1, by = 0.25)
labels <- ticks

p_prisma_multi <- ggplot(df, aes(x = logRR, y = row)) +
  
  # Confidence interval
  geom_segment(aes(x = logLower, xend = logUpper,
                   y = row, yend = row)) +
  
  # MD points
  geom_point(size = 3, shape = 15) +
  
  # Vertical line for MD = 0
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = 0, y = 4.7, yend = 0),
               linetype = 3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # Graduations of the X axis
  geom_segment(
    data = data.frame(x = ticks),
    aes(x = x, xend = x, y = -0.1, yend = -0.4),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = min(ticks), xend = max(ticks), y = -0.1, yend = -0.1),
               inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # Labels
  geom_text(
    data = data.frame(x = ticks, lab = labels),
    aes(x = x, y = -0.6, label = lab),
    size = 3,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  
  # Y axis
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-2, 5.5), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-2.5, 3)) +
  
  # Themes
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()
  )

# Add text to the plot
p_prisma_multi <- p_prisma_multi +
  
    # title
  geom_text(aes(x = -2.5, label = SubgroupH), hjust = 0, fontface = "italic") +
  
  # Mean Diff
  geom_text(aes(x = 1.5, label = textRR), hjust = 0) +
  
  # Column titles
  annotate("text", x = -2.5, y = 5, label = "Variable", hjust = 0, fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.5,  y = 5, label = "Mean difference (95% CI)", hjust = 0, fontface = 2) +
  
  annotate("text", x = -1, y = -1.5, label = "Favors Less Improvement", fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x =  1.5, y = -1.5, label = "Favors Improvement", fontface = 2) 

p_prisma_multi

```

## BOOST {.tabset .tabset-fade}

### Unadjusted

```{r, echo = FALSE}

Data.sg.boost <- Data.boost %>% 
  dplyr::select(study_id, ACQ5_rescale,acq_attack, FeNO_log10,feno_attack, BEC_log10,blood_eos_attack, delta,Age_rescale10,Sex , BMI_rescale5,Pre_FEV1_PORC_rescale, Pre_FEV1_FVC_ratio_rescale, Previous_asthma_attack_yesno, fev1_attack  )

Q25 <- quantile(Data.sg.boost$acq_attack, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
Q75 <- quantile(Data.sg.boost$acq_attack, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
IQR_acq5 <- Q75 - Q25
Data.sg.boost$acq5_IQR <- Data.sg.boost$acq_attack / IQR_acq5

Q25 <- quantile(Data.sg.boost$feno_attack, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
Q75 <- quantile(Data.sg.boost$feno_attack, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
IQR_FeNO <- Q75 - Q25
Data.sg.boost$FeNO_IQR <- Data.sg.boost$feno_attack / IQR_FeNO

Q25 <- quantile(Data.sg.boost$blood_eos_attack, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
Q75 <- quantile(Data.sg.boost$blood_eos_attack, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
IQR_BloodEOS_Abso <- Q75 - Q25
Data.sg.boost$BloodEOS_Abso_IQR <- Data.sg.boost$blood_eos_attack / IQR_BloodEOS_Abso

# Linear regressions for each group
mod0 <- lm(delta ~ acq5_IQR, data = Data.sg.boost)
mod1 <- lm(delta ~ FeNO_log10, data = Data.sg.boost)
mod2 <- lm(delta ~ BEC_log10, data = Data.sg.boost)

# Coefficients and interval confidence for all regressions
coef <- round(rbind("Overall" = Confint(mod0)[-1,], "ACQ_2" = Confint(mod2)[-1,],
                    "ACQ_1" = Confint(mod1)[-1,]), 2)

mydf <- data.frame(
  SubgroupH = c("ACQ5 (per IQR)", 'Blood eos (per 10-fold)', "FeNO (per 10-fold)"),
  RateRatio = coef[,1],
  RateLower = coef[,2],
  RateUpper = coef[,3],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Data frame in log for the forest plot
df <- mydf %>%
  mutate(
    row = seq(n(), 1),
    logRR = RateRatio,
    logLower = RateLower,
    logUpper = RateUpper,
    SubgroupH = ifelse(is.na(SubgroupH), "", SubgroupH),
    textRR = ifelse(!is.na(RateRatio), paste0(RateRatio, " (", RateLower, "-", RateUpper, ")"), "")
  )

```

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8, warning = FALSE}


ticks  <- seq(-0.5, 1, by = 0.25)
labels <- ticks

p_boost <- ggplot(df, aes(x = logRR, y = row)) +
  
  # Confidence interval
  geom_segment(aes(x = logLower, xend = logUpper,
                   y = row, yend = row)) +
  
  # MD points
  geom_point(size = 3, shape = 15) +
  
  # Vertical line for MD = 0
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = 0, y = 4, yend = 0),
               linetype = 3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # Graduations of the X axis
  geom_segment(
    data = data.frame(x = ticks),
    aes(x = x, xend = x, y = 0, yend = -0.4),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = min(ticks), xend = max(ticks), y = 0, yend = 0),
               inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # Labels
  geom_text(
    data = data.frame(x = ticks, lab = labels),
    aes(x = x, y = -0.6, label = lab),
    size = 3,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  
  # Y axis
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-2, 5), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-2.5, 3)) +
  
  # Themes
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()
  )

# Add text to the plot
p_boost <- p_boost +
  
    # title
  geom_text(aes(x = -2.5, label = SubgroupH), hjust = 0, fontface = "italic") +
  
  # Mean Diff
  geom_text(aes(x = 1.5, label = textRR), hjust = 0) +
  
  # Column titles
  annotate("text", x = -2.5, y = 4.5, label = "Variable", hjust = 0, fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.5,  y = 4.5, label = "Mean difference (95% CI)", hjust = 0, fontface = 2) +
  
  annotate("text", x = -0.5, y = -1.5, label = "Favors Less Improvement", fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x =  1.2, y = -1.5, label = "Favors Improvement", fontface = 2) 

p_boost


```

### Adjusted - v1

```{r, echo = FALSE}

# Fit multivariable linear regression
mod_multi <- lm(delta ~ acq5_IQR + BloodEOS_Abso_IQR + FeNO_IQR  + fev1_attack, data = Data.sg.boost)

# Extract coefficients and 95% CIs for the predictors only
coef <- round(
  Confint(mod_multi)[c(2:4), ], 2
)

df <- data.frame(
  SubgroupH = c("ACQ5 (per IQR 1.4)", 
                "Blood eos (per IQR 0.06)", 
                "FeNO (per IQR 62.5)"),
  logRR    = coef[,1],
  logLower = coef[,2],
  logUpper = coef[,3],
  row      = 3:1
)

df$textRR <- paste0(df$logRR, " (", df$logLower, ", ", df$logUpper, ")")

df$logLower <- ifelse( df$logLower < -0.5, -0.5, df$logLower              )
df$logUpper <- ifelse( df$logUpper > 1, 1, df$logUpper              )

```

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8, warning = FALSE}

ticks  <- seq(-0.5, 1, by = 0.25)
labels <- ticks

p_boost_multi <- ggplot(df, aes(x = logRR, y = row)) +
  
  # Confidence interval
  geom_segment(aes(x = logLower, xend = logUpper,
                   y = row, yend = row)) +
  
  # MD points
  geom_point(size = 3, shape = 15) +
  
  # Vertical line for MD = 0
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = 0, y = 4, yend = 0),
               linetype = 3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # Graduations of the X axis
  geom_segment(
    data = data.frame(x = ticks),
    aes(x = x, xend = x, y = -0.1, yend = -0.4),
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = min(ticks), xend = max(ticks), y = -0.1, yend = -0.1),
               inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # Labels
  geom_text(
    data = data.frame(x = ticks, lab = labels),
    aes(x = x, y = -0.6, label = lab),
    size = 3,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  
  # Y axis
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-2, 5), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-2.5, 3)) +
  
  # Themes
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()
  )

# Add text to the plot
p_boost_multi <- p_boost_multi +
  
    # title
  geom_text(aes(x = -2.5, label = SubgroupH), hjust = 0, fontface = "italic") +
  
  # Mean Diff
  geom_text(aes(x = 1.5, label = textRR), hjust = 0) +
  
  # Column titles
  annotate("text", x = -2.5, y = 4.5, label = "Variable", hjust = 0, fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.5,  y = 4.5, label = "Mean difference (95% CI)", hjust = 0, fontface = 2) +
  
  annotate("text", x = -1, y = -1.5, label = "Favors Less Improvement", fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x =  1.5, y = -1.5, label = "Favors Improvement", fontface = 2) 

p_boost_multi

```

# Density plots {.tabset .tabset-fade}

## Oracle Dream

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8}

p_density_dream <- Data.oracle.dream %>% 
  filter(!is.na(ACQ_baseline_score_mean)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = ACQ_baseline_score_mean, colour = Mepo_placebo, fill = Mepo_placebo)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#00a1d5", "#b24745")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#00a1d5", "#b24745")) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1, 5), expand = FALSE) +
  xlab("\nBaseline ACQ-5 Score") +
  ylab("\nProbability density \n") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )

p_density_dream + ylab("Probability density \n")

```

## Prisma

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8}

p_density_prisma <- Data.Prisma %>% 
  filter(!is.na(acq5_moy)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = acq5_moy)) +
  geom_density(fill = "lightblue", colour = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1, 5), expand = FALSE) +
  labs(
    x = "\nBaseline ACQ-5 Score", 
    y = "\n Probability density \n"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )
p_density_prisma

```

## Boost

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8}

p_density_boost <- Data.boost %>% 
  filter(!is.na(acq_attack)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = acq_attack)) +
  geom_density(fill = "lightblue", colour = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1, 5), expand = FALSE) +
  xlab("\nBaseline ACQ-5 Score") +
  ylab(NULL) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )

p_density_boost + ylab("Probability density \n")

```

# Stacked figures {.tabset .tabset-fade}

## Dream

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 14, fig.width = 8, warning = FALSE}

top_dream <- plot_grid(
  NULL,
  spline_dream,
  NULL,
  p_density_dream,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(0.2, 1, 0.2, 0.5),
  labels = c("", "a", "", "b"),
  align = "v"
)


bot_dream <- plot_grid(
  p_dream_adjusted,
  NULL,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(1, 0.1),
  labels = c("c", "")
)

plot_grid(
  top_dream,
  NULL,
  bot_dream,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(1, 0.15, 1.2)
)


u_dream <- plot_grid(
  top_dream,
  NULL,
  bot_dream,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(1, 0.15, 1.2)
)

ggsave(
  filename = "plot_DREAM.pdf",
  plot = u_dream,   
  device = "pdf",
  width = 8,
  height = 14,
  units = "in"
)

```

## Prisma and boost (Adjusted for BEC, FeNO and FEV1 post L V1 in one model) - v1

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 12, fig.width = 12, warning = FALSE}

top4 <- plot_grid(
  spline_prisma, 
  spline_boost,
  NULL,
  NULL,
  p_density_prisma,
  p_density_boost,
  ncol = 2,
  labels = c("a", "b", "", "", "c", "d"),
  rel_heights = c(1, 0.2, 0.5),
  align = "v"
)

bot2 <- plot_grid(
  p_prisma_multi,
  p_boost_multi,
  NULL,
  NULL,
  ncol = 2,
  labels = c("e", "f", "", ""),
  rel_heights = c(1, 0.1),
  align = "h"
)

plot_grid(
  top4,
  NULL,
  bot2,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(1, 0.1, 0.4)
)

u <- plot_grid(
  top4,
  NULL,
  bot2,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(1, 0.1, 0.4)
)

ggsave(
  filename = "plot_PRISMA_BOOSTv2.pdf",
  plot = u,   
  device = "pdf",
  width = 14,
  height = 14,
  units = "in"
)

```
